Clean Architecture Demo
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
kernel32.py
Go to the documentation of this file.

31"""
32Wrapper for kernel32.dll in ctypes.
33"""
34
35__revision__ = "$Id$"
36
37import warnings
38
39from winappdbg.win32.defines import *
40
41from winappdbg.win32 import context_i386
42from winappdbg.win32 import context_amd64
43
44# ==============================================================================
45# This is used later on to calculate the list of exported symbols.
46_all = None
47_all = set(vars().keys())
48_all.add("version")
49# ==============================================================================
50
51from winappdbg.win32.version import *
52
53# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
54
55
56# This can't be defined in defines.py because it calls GetLastError().
57def RaiseIfLastError(result, func=None, arguments=()):
58 """
59 Error checking for Win32 API calls with no error-specific return value.
60
61 Regardless of the return value, the function calls GetLastError(). If the
62 code is not C{ERROR_SUCCESS} then a C{WindowsError} exception is raised.
63
64 For this to work, the user MUST call SetLastError(ERROR_SUCCESS) prior to
65 calling the API. Otherwise an exception may be raised even on success,
66 since most API calls don't clear the error status code.
67 """
68 code = GetLastError()
69 if code != ERROR_SUCCESS:
70 raise ctypes.WinError(code)
71 return result
72
73
74# --- CONTEXT structure and constants ------------------------------------------
75
76ContextArchMask = 0x0FFF0000 # just guessing here! seems to work, though
77
78if arch == ARCH_I386:
79 from winappdbg.win32.context_i386 import *
80elif arch == ARCH_AMD64:
81 if bits == 64:
82 from winappdbg.win32.context_amd64 import *
83 else:
84 from winappdbg.win32.context_i386 import *
85else:
86 warnings.warn("Unknown or unsupported architecture: %s" % arch)
87
88# --- Constants ----------------------------------------------------------------
89
90STILL_ACTIVE = 259
91
92WAIT_TIMEOUT = 0x102
93WAIT_FAILED = -1
94WAIT_OBJECT_0 = 0
95
96EXCEPTION_NONCONTINUABLE = 0x1 # Noncontinuable exception
97EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS = 15 # maximum number of exception parameters
98MAXIMUM_WAIT_OBJECTS = 64 # Maximum number of wait objects
99MAXIMUM_SUSPEND_COUNT = 0x7F # Maximum times thread can be suspended
100
101FORMAT_MESSAGE_ALLOCATE_BUFFER = 0x00000100
102FORMAT_MESSAGE_FROM_SYSTEM = 0x00001000
103
104GR_GDIOBJECTS = 0
105GR_USEROBJECTS = 1
106
107PROCESS_NAME_NATIVE = 1
108
109MAXINTATOM = 0xC000
110
111STD_INPUT_HANDLE = 0xFFFFFFF6 # (DWORD)-10
112STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE = 0xFFFFFFF5 # (DWORD)-11
113STD_ERROR_HANDLE = 0xFFFFFFF4 # (DWORD)-12
114
115ATTACH_PARENT_PROCESS = 0xFFFFFFFF # (DWORD)-1
116
117# LoadLibraryEx constants
118DONT_RESOLVE_DLL_REFERENCES = 0x00000001
119LOAD_LIBRARY_AS_DATAFILE = 0x00000002
120LOAD_WITH_ALTERED_SEARCH_PATH = 0x00000008
121LOAD_IGNORE_CODE_AUTHZ_LEVEL = 0x00000010
122LOAD_LIBRARY_AS_IMAGE_RESOURCE = 0x00000020
123LOAD_LIBRARY_AS_DATAFILE_EXCLUSIVE = 0x00000040
124
125# SetSearchPathMode flags
126# TODO I couldn't find these constants :(
127
130
131# Console control events
132CTRL_C_EVENT = 0
133CTRL_BREAK_EVENT = 1
134CTRL_CLOSE_EVENT = 2
135CTRL_LOGOFF_EVENT = 5
136CTRL_SHUTDOWN_EVENT = 6
137
138# Heap flags
139HEAP_NO_SERIALIZE = 0x00000001
140HEAP_GENERATE_EXCEPTIONS = 0x00000004
141HEAP_ZERO_MEMORY = 0x00000008
142HEAP_CREATE_ENABLE_EXECUTE = 0x00040000
143
144# Standard access rights
145DELETE = long(0x00010000)
146READ_CONTROL = long(0x00020000)
147WRITE_DAC = long(0x00040000)
148WRITE_OWNER = long(0x00080000)
149SYNCHRONIZE = long(0x00100000)
150STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED = long(0x000F0000)
151STANDARD_RIGHTS_READ = READ_CONTROL
152STANDARD_RIGHTS_WRITE = READ_CONTROL
153STANDARD_RIGHTS_EXECUTE = READ_CONTROL
154STANDARD_RIGHTS_ALL = long(0x001F0000)
155SPECIFIC_RIGHTS_ALL = long(0x0000FFFF)
156
157# Mutex access rights
158MUTEX_ALL_ACCESS = 0x1F0001
159MUTEX_MODIFY_STATE = 1
160
161# Event access rights
162EVENT_ALL_ACCESS = 0x1F0003
163EVENT_MODIFY_STATE = 2
164
165# Semaphore access rights
166SEMAPHORE_ALL_ACCESS = 0x1F0003
167SEMAPHORE_MODIFY_STATE = 2
168
169# Timer access rights
170TIMER_ALL_ACCESS = 0x1F0003
171TIMER_MODIFY_STATE = 2
172TIMER_QUERY_STATE = 1
173
174# Process access rights for OpenProcess
175PROCESS_TERMINATE = 0x0001
176PROCESS_CREATE_THREAD = 0x0002
177PROCESS_SET_SESSIONID = 0x0004
178PROCESS_VM_OPERATION = 0x0008
179PROCESS_VM_READ = 0x0010
180PROCESS_VM_WRITE = 0x0020
181PROCESS_DUP_HANDLE = 0x0040
182PROCESS_CREATE_PROCESS = 0x0080
183PROCESS_SET_QUOTA = 0x0100
184PROCESS_SET_INFORMATION = 0x0200
185PROCESS_QUERY_INFORMATION = 0x0400
186PROCESS_SUSPEND_RESUME = 0x0800
187PROCESS_QUERY_LIMITED_INFORMATION = 0x1000
188
189# Thread access rights for OpenThread
190THREAD_TERMINATE = 0x0001
191THREAD_SUSPEND_RESUME = 0x0002
192THREAD_ALERT = 0x0004
193THREAD_GET_CONTEXT = 0x0008
194THREAD_SET_CONTEXT = 0x0010
195THREAD_SET_INFORMATION = 0x0020
196THREAD_QUERY_INFORMATION = 0x0040
197THREAD_SET_THREAD_TOKEN = 0x0080
198THREAD_IMPERSONATE = 0x0100
199THREAD_DIRECT_IMPERSONATION = 0x0200
200THREAD_SET_LIMITED_INFORMATION = 0x0400
201THREAD_QUERY_LIMITED_INFORMATION = 0x0800
202
203# The values of PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS and THREAD_ALL_ACCESS were changed in Vista/2008
204PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS_NT = STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SYNCHRONIZE | 0xFFF
205PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS_VISTA = STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SYNCHRONIZE | 0xFFFF
206THREAD_ALL_ACCESS_NT = STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SYNCHRONIZE | 0x3FF
207THREAD_ALL_ACCESS_VISTA = STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SYNCHRONIZE | 0xFFFF
208if NTDDI_VERSION < NTDDI_VISTA:
209 PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS = PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS_NT
210 THREAD_ALL_ACCESS = THREAD_ALL_ACCESS_NT
211else:
212 PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS = PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS_VISTA
213 THREAD_ALL_ACCESS = THREAD_ALL_ACCESS_VISTA
214
215# Process priority classes
216
217IDLE_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000040
218BELOW_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00004000
219NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000020
220ABOVE_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00008000
221HIGH_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000080
222REALTIME_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000100
223
224PROCESS_MODE_BACKGROUND_BEGIN = 0x00100000
225PROCESS_MODE_BACKGROUND_END = 0x00200000
226
227# dwCreationFlag values
228
229DEBUG_PROCESS = 0x00000001
230DEBUG_ONLY_THIS_PROCESS = 0x00000002
231CREATE_SUSPENDED = 0x00000004 # Threads and processes
232DETACHED_PROCESS = 0x00000008
233CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE = 0x00000010
234NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000020
235IDLE_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000040
236HIGH_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000080
237REALTIME_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00000100
238CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP = 0x00000200
239CREATE_UNICODE_ENVIRONMENT = 0x00000400
240CREATE_SEPARATE_WOW_VDM = 0x00000800
241CREATE_SHARED_WOW_VDM = 0x00001000
242CREATE_FORCEDOS = 0x00002000
243BELOW_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00004000
244ABOVE_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS = 0x00008000
245INHERIT_PARENT_AFFINITY = 0x00010000
246STACK_SIZE_PARAM_IS_A_RESERVATION = 0x00010000 # Threads only
247INHERIT_CALLER_PRIORITY = 0x00020000 # Deprecated
248CREATE_PROTECTED_PROCESS = 0x00040000
249EXTENDED_STARTUPINFO_PRESENT = 0x00080000
250PROCESS_MODE_BACKGROUND_BEGIN = 0x00100000
251PROCESS_MODE_BACKGROUND_END = 0x00200000
252CREATE_BREAKAWAY_FROM_JOB = 0x01000000
253CREATE_PRESERVE_CODE_AUTHZ_LEVEL = 0x02000000
254CREATE_DEFAULT_ERROR_MODE = 0x04000000
255CREATE_NO_WINDOW = 0x08000000
256PROFILE_USER = 0x10000000
257PROFILE_KERNEL = 0x20000000
258PROFILE_SERVER = 0x40000000
259CREATE_IGNORE_SYSTEM_DEFAULT = 0x80000000
260
261# Thread priority values
262
263THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_LOWRT = 15 # value that gets a thread to LowRealtime-1
264THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_MAX = 2 # maximum thread base priority boost
265THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_MIN = -2 # minimum thread base priority boost
266THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_IDLE = -15 # value that gets a thread to idle
267
268THREAD_PRIORITY_LOWEST = THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_MIN
269THREAD_PRIORITY_BELOW_NORMAL = THREAD_PRIORITY_LOWEST + 1
270THREAD_PRIORITY_NORMAL = 0
271THREAD_PRIORITY_HIGHEST = THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_MAX
272THREAD_PRIORITY_ABOVE_NORMAL = THREAD_PRIORITY_HIGHEST - 1
273THREAD_PRIORITY_ERROR_RETURN = long(0xFFFFFFFF)
274
275THREAD_PRIORITY_TIME_CRITICAL = THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_LOWRT
276THREAD_PRIORITY_IDLE = THREAD_BASE_PRIORITY_IDLE
277
278# Memory access
279SECTION_QUERY = 0x0001
280SECTION_MAP_WRITE = 0x0002
281SECTION_MAP_READ = 0x0004
282SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE = 0x0008
283SECTION_EXTEND_SIZE = 0x0010
284SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE_EXPLICIT = 0x0020 # not included in SECTION_ALL_ACCESS
285
286SECTION_ALL_ACCESS = (
287 STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SECTION_QUERY | SECTION_MAP_WRITE | SECTION_MAP_READ | SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE | SECTION_EXTEND_SIZE
288)
289PAGE_NOACCESS = 0x01
290PAGE_READONLY = 0x02
291PAGE_READWRITE = 0x04
292PAGE_WRITECOPY = 0x08
293PAGE_EXECUTE = 0x10
294PAGE_EXECUTE_READ = 0x20
295PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE = 0x40
296PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY = 0x80
297PAGE_GUARD = 0x100
298PAGE_NOCACHE = 0x200
299PAGE_WRITECOMBINE = 0x400
300MEM_COMMIT = 0x1000
301MEM_RESERVE = 0x2000
302MEM_DECOMMIT = 0x4000
303MEM_RELEASE = 0x8000
304MEM_FREE = 0x10000
305MEM_PRIVATE = 0x20000
306MEM_MAPPED = 0x40000
307MEM_RESET = 0x80000
308MEM_TOP_DOWN = 0x100000
309MEM_WRITE_WATCH = 0x200000
310MEM_PHYSICAL = 0x400000
311MEM_LARGE_PAGES = 0x20000000
312MEM_4MB_PAGES = 0x80000000
313SEC_FILE = 0x800000
314SEC_IMAGE = 0x1000000
315SEC_RESERVE = 0x4000000
316SEC_COMMIT = 0x8000000
317SEC_NOCACHE = 0x10000000
318SEC_LARGE_PAGES = 0x80000000
319MEM_IMAGE = SEC_IMAGE
320WRITE_WATCH_FLAG_RESET = 0x01
321FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS = 0xF001F
322
323SECTION_QUERY = 0x0001
324SECTION_MAP_WRITE = 0x0002
325SECTION_MAP_READ = 0x0004
326SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE = 0x0008
327SECTION_EXTEND_SIZE = 0x0010
328SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE_EXPLICIT = 0x0020 # not included in SECTION_ALL_ACCESS
329
330SECTION_ALL_ACCESS = (
331 STANDARD_RIGHTS_REQUIRED | SECTION_QUERY | SECTION_MAP_WRITE | SECTION_MAP_READ | SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE | SECTION_EXTEND_SIZE
332)
333
334FILE_MAP_COPY = SECTION_QUERY
335FILE_MAP_WRITE = SECTION_MAP_WRITE
336FILE_MAP_READ = SECTION_MAP_READ
337FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS = SECTION_ALL_ACCESS
338FILE_MAP_EXECUTE = SECTION_MAP_EXECUTE_EXPLICIT # not included in FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS
339
340GENERIC_READ = 0x80000000
341GENERIC_WRITE = 0x40000000
342GENERIC_EXECUTE = 0x20000000
343GENERIC_ALL = 0x10000000
344
345FILE_SHARE_READ = 0x00000001
346FILE_SHARE_WRITE = 0x00000002
347FILE_SHARE_DELETE = 0x00000004
348
349CREATE_NEW = 1
350CREATE_ALWAYS = 2
351OPEN_EXISTING = 3
352OPEN_ALWAYS = 4
353TRUNCATE_EXISTING = 5
354
355FILE_ATTRIBUTE_READONLY = 0x00000001
356FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL = 0x00000080
357FILE_ATTRIBUTE_TEMPORARY = 0x00000100
358
359FILE_FLAG_WRITE_THROUGH = 0x80000000
360FILE_FLAG_NO_BUFFERING = 0x20000000
361FILE_FLAG_RANDOM_ACCESS = 0x10000000
362FILE_FLAG_SEQUENTIAL_SCAN = 0x08000000
363FILE_FLAG_DELETE_ON_CLOSE = 0x04000000
364FILE_FLAG_OVERLAPPED = 0x40000000
365
366FILE_ATTRIBUTE_READONLY = 0x00000001
367FILE_ATTRIBUTE_HIDDEN = 0x00000002

371FILE_ATTRIBUTE_DEVICE = 0x00000040
372FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL = 0x00000080
373FILE_ATTRIBUTE_TEMPORARY = 0x00000100

388DBG_CONTINUE = long(0x00010002)

390DBG_UNABLE_TO_PROVIDE_HANDLE = long(0x40010002)

392DBG_TERMINATE_PROCESS = long(0x40010004)

395DBG_RIPEXCEPTION = long(0x40010007)
396DBG_CONTROL_BREAK = long(0x40010008)
397DBG_COMMAND_EXCEPTION = long(0x40010009)
398DBG_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED = long(0x80010001)
399DBG_NO_STATE_CHANGE = long(0xC0010001)
400DBG_APP_NOT_IDLE = long(0xC0010002)
401
402# Status codes
403STATUS_WAIT_0 = long(0x00000000)
404STATUS_ABANDONED_WAIT_0 = long(0x00000080)
405STATUS_USER_APC = long(0x000000C0)
406STATUS_TIMEOUT = long(0x00000102)
407STATUS_PENDING = long(0x00000103)
408STATUS_SEGMENT_NOTIFICATION = long(0x40000005)
409STATUS_GUARD_PAGE_VIOLATION = long(0x80000001)
410STATUS_DATATYPE_MISALIGNMENT = long(0x80000002)
411STATUS_BREAKPOINT = long(0x80000003)
412STATUS_SINGLE_STEP = long(0x80000004)
413STATUS_INVALID_INFO_CLASS = long(0xC0000003)
414STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION = long(0xC0000005)
415STATUS_IN_PAGE_ERROR = long(0xC0000006)
416STATUS_INVALID_HANDLE = long(0xC0000008)
417STATUS_NO_MEMORY = long(0xC0000017)
418STATUS_ILLEGAL_INSTRUCTION = long(0xC000001D)
419STATUS_NONCONTINUABLE_EXCEPTION = long(0xC0000025)
420STATUS_INVALID_DISPOSITION = long(0xC0000026)
421STATUS_ARRAY_BOUNDS_EXCEEDED = long(0xC000008C)

423STATUS_FLOAT_DIVIDE_BY_ZERO = long(0xC000008E)

425STATUS_FLOAT_INVALID_OPERATION = long(0xC0000090)

427STATUS_FLOAT_STACK_CHECK = long(0xC0000092)

430STATUS_INTEGER_OVERFLOW = long(0xC0000095)
431STATUS_PRIVILEGED_INSTRUCTION = long(0xC0000096)
432STATUS_STACK_OVERFLOW = long(0xC00000FD)
433STATUS_CONTROL_C_EXIT = long(0xC000013A)
434STATUS_FLOAT_MULTIPLE_FAULTS = long(0xC00002B4)
435STATUS_FLOAT_MULTIPLE_TRAPS = long(0xC00002B5)

438STATUS_SXS_INVALID_DEACTIVATION = long(0xC0150010)
439

441STATUS_WX86_BREAKPOINT = long(0x4000001F)
442STATUS_HEAP_CORRUPTION = long(0xC0000374)
443
444STATUS_POSSIBLE_DEADLOCK = long(0xC0000194)
445

448# Exception codes
449

453EXCEPTION_DATATYPE_MISALIGNMENT = STATUS_DATATYPE_MISALIGNMENT
454EXCEPTION_FLT_DENORMAL_OPERAND = STATUS_FLOAT_DENORMAL_OPERAND
455EXCEPTION_FLT_DIVIDE_BY_ZERO = STATUS_FLOAT_DIVIDE_BY_ZERO

461EXCEPTION_ILLEGAL_INSTRUCTION = STATUS_ILLEGAL_INSTRUCTION
462EXCEPTION_IN_PAGE_ERROR = STATUS_IN_PAGE_ERROR
463EXCEPTION_INT_DIVIDE_BY_ZERO = STATUS_INTEGER_DIVIDE_BY_ZERO

469EXCEPTION_STACK_OVERFLOW = STATUS_STACK_OVERFLOW
470

472EXCEPTION_INVALID_HANDLE = STATUS_INVALID_HANDLE

477

510PRODUCT_DATACENTER_SERVER_V = 0x00000025

512PRODUCT_ENTERPRISE_E = 0x00000046

514PRODUCT_ENTERPRISE_SERVER = 0x0000000A
515PRODUCT_ENTERPRISE_SERVER_CORE = 0x0000000E

519PRODUCT_HOME_BASIC = 0x00000002
520PRODUCT_HOME_BASIC_E = 0x00000043

522PRODUCT_HOME_PREMIUM = 0x00000003
523PRODUCT_HOME_PREMIUM_E = 0x00000044
524PRODUCT_HOME_PREMIUM_N = 0x0000001A

542PRODUCT_STARTER_N = 0x0000002F

545PRODUCT_STORAGE_STANDARD_SERVER = 0x00000015

550PRODUCT_ULTIMATE_E = 0x00000047

552PRODUCT_WEB_SERVER = 0x00000011
553PRODUCT_WEB_SERVER_CORE = 0x0000001D
554
555# DEP policy flags
556PROCESS_DEP_ENABLE = 1
557PROCESS_DEP_DISABLE_ATL_THUNK_EMULATION = 2
558
559# Error modes
560SEM_FAILCRITICALERRORS = 0x001
561SEM_NOGPFAULTERRORBOX = 0x002
562SEM_NOALIGNMENTFAULTEXCEPT = 0x004
563SEM_NOOPENFILEERRORBOX = 0x800
564
565# GetHandleInformation / SetHandleInformation
566HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT = 0x00000001
567HANDLE_FLAG_PROTECT_FROM_CLOSE = 0x00000002
568
569# --- Handle wrappers ----------------------------------------------------------
570
571
572class Handle(object):
573 """
574 Encapsulates Win32 handles to avoid leaking them.
575
576 @type inherit: bool
577 @ivar inherit: C{True} if the handle is to be inherited by child processes,
578 C{False} otherwise.
579
580 @type protectFromClose: bool
581 @ivar protectFromClose: Set to C{True} to prevent the handle from being
582 closed. Must be set to C{False} before you're done using the handle,
583 or it will be left open until the debugger exits. Use with care!
584
585 @see:
586 L{ProcessHandle}, L{ThreadHandle}, L{FileHandle}, L{SnapshotHandle}
587 """
588
589 # XXX DEBUG
590 # When this private flag is True each Handle will print a message to
591 # standard output when it's created and destroyed. This is useful for
592 # detecting handle leaks within WinAppDbg itself.
593 __bLeakDetection = False
594
595 def __init__(self, aHandle=None, bOwnership=True):
596 """
597 @type aHandle: int
598 @param aHandle: Win32 handle value.
599
600 @type bOwnership: bool
601 @param bOwnership:
602 C{True} if we own the handle and we need to close it.
603 C{False} if someone else will be calling L{CloseHandle}.
604 """
605 super(Handle, self).__init__()
606 self._value = self._normalize(aHandle)
607 self.bOwnership = bOwnership
608 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
609 print("INIT HANDLE (%r) %r" % (self.value, self))
610
611 @property
612 def value(self):
613 return self._value
614
615 def __del__(self):
616 """
617 Closes the Win32 handle when the Python object is destroyed.
618 """
619 try:
620 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
621 print("DEL HANDLE %r" % self)
622 self.close()
623 except Exception:
624 pass
625
626 def __enter__(self):
627 """
628 Compatibility with the "C{with}" Python statement.
629 """
630 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
631 print("ENTER HANDLE %r" % self)
632 return self
633
634 def __exit__(self, type, value, traceback):
635 """
636 Compatibility with the "C{with}" Python statement.
637 """
638 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
639 print("EXIT HANDLE %r" % self)
640 try:
641 self.close()
642 except Exception:
643 pass
644
645 def __copy__(self):
646 """
647 Duplicates the Win32 handle when copying the Python object.
648
649 @rtype: L{Handle}
650 @return: A new handle to the same Win32 object.
651 """
652 return self.dup()
653
654 def __deepcopy__(self):
655 """
656 Duplicates the Win32 handle when copying the Python object.
657
658 @rtype: L{Handle}
659 @return: A new handle to the same win32 object.
660 """
661 return self.dup()
662
663 @property
664 def _as_parameter_(self):
665 """
666 Compatibility with ctypes.
667 Allows passing transparently a Handle object to an API call.
668 """
669 return HANDLE(self.value)
670
671 @staticmethod
672 def from_param(value):
673 """
674 Compatibility with ctypes.
675 Allows passing transparently a Handle object to an API call.
676
677 @type value: int
678 @param value: Numeric handle value.
679 """
680 return HANDLE(value)
681
682 def close(self):
683 """
684 Closes the Win32 handle.
685 """
686 if self.bOwnership and self.value not in (None, INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE):
687 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
688 print("CLOSE HANDLE (%d) %r" % (self.value, self))
689 try:
690 self._close()
691 finally:
692 self._value = None
693
694 def _close(self):
695 """
696 Low-level close method.
697 This is a private method, do not call it.
698 """
699 CloseHandle(self.value)
700
701 def dup(self):
702 """
703 @rtype: L{Handle}
704 @return: A new handle to the same Win32 object.
705 """
706 if self.value is None:
707 raise ValueError("Closed handles can't be duplicated!")
708 new_handle = DuplicateHandle(self.value)
709 if Handle.__bLeakDetection: # XXX DEBUG
710 print("DUP HANDLE (%d -> %d) %r %r" % (self.value, new_handle.value, self, new_handle))
711 return new_handle
712
713 @staticmethod
714 def _normalize(value):
715 """
716 Normalize handle values.
717 """
718 if hasattr(value, "value"):
719 value = value.value
720 if value is not None:
721 value = long(value)
722 return value
723
724 def wait(self, dwMilliseconds=None):
725 """
726 Wait for the Win32 object to be signaled.
727
728 @type dwMilliseconds: int
729 @param dwMilliseconds: (Optional) Timeout value in milliseconds.
730 Use C{INFINITE} or C{None} for no timeout.
731 """
732 if self.value is None:
733 raise ValueError("Handle is already closed!")
734 if dwMilliseconds is None:
735 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
736 r = WaitForSingleObject(self.value, dwMilliseconds)
737 if r != WAIT_OBJECT_0:
738 raise ctypes.WinError(r)
739
740 def __repr__(self):
741 return "<%s: %s>" % (self.__class__.__name__, self.value)
742
743 def __get_inherit(self):
744 if self.value is None:
745 raise ValueError("Handle is already closed!")
746 return bool(GetHandleInformation(self.value) & HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT)
747
748 def __set_inherit(self, value):
749 if self.value is None:
750 raise ValueError("Handle is already closed!")
751 flag = (0, HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT)[bool(value)]
752 SetHandleInformation(self.value, flag, flag)
753
754 inherit = property(__get_inherit, __set_inherit)
755
756 def __get_protectFromClose(self):
757 if self.value is None:
758 raise ValueError("Handle is already closed!")
759 return bool(GetHandleInformation(self.value) & HANDLE_FLAG_PROTECT_FROM_CLOSE)
760
761 def __set_protectFromClose(self, value):
762 if self.value is None:
763 raise ValueError("Handle is already closed!")
764 flag = (0, HANDLE_FLAG_PROTECT_FROM_CLOSE)[bool(value)]
765 SetHandleInformation(self.value, flag, flag)
766
767 protectFromClose = property(__get_protectFromClose, __set_protectFromClose)
768
769
770class UserModeHandle(Handle):
771 """
772 Base class for non-kernel handles. Generally this means they are closed
773 by special Win32 API functions instead of CloseHandle() and some standard
774 operations (synchronizing, duplicating, inheritance) are not supported.
775
776 @type _TYPE: C type
777 @cvar _TYPE: C type to translate this handle to.
778 Subclasses should override this.
779 Defaults to L{HANDLE}.
780 """
781
782 # Subclasses should override this.
783 _TYPE = HANDLE
784
785 # This method must be implemented by subclasses.
786 def _close(self):
787 raise NotImplementedError()
788
789 # Translation to C type.
790 @property
791 def _as_parameter_(self):
792 return self._TYPE(self.value)
793
794 # Translation to C type.
795 @staticmethod
796 def from_param(value):
797 return self._TYPE(self.value)
798
799 # Operation not supported.
800 @property
801 def inherit(self):
802 return False
803
804 # Operation not supported.
805 @property
806 def protectFromClose(self):
807 return False
808
809 # Operation not supported.
810 def dup(self):
811 raise NotImplementedError()
812
813 # Operation not supported.
814 def wait(self, dwMilliseconds=None):
815 raise NotImplementedError()
816
817
818class ProcessHandle(Handle):
819 """
820 Win32 process handle.
821
822 @type dwAccess: int
823 @ivar dwAccess: Current access flags to this handle.
824 This is the same value passed to L{OpenProcess}.
825 Can only be C{None} if C{aHandle} is also C{None}.
826 Defaults to L{PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS}.
827
828 @see: L{Handle}
829 """
830
831 def __init__(self, aHandle=None, bOwnership=True, dwAccess=PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS):
832 """
833 @type aHandle: int
834 @param aHandle: Win32 handle value.
835
836 @type bOwnership: bool
837 @param bOwnership:
838 C{True} if we own the handle and we need to close it.
839 C{False} if someone else will be calling L{CloseHandle}.
840
841 @type dwAccess: int
842 @param dwAccess: Current access flags to this handle.
843 This is the same value passed to L{OpenProcess}.
844 Can only be C{None} if C{aHandle} is also C{None}.
845 Defaults to L{PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS}.
846 """
847 super(ProcessHandle, self).__init__(aHandle, bOwnership)
848 self.dwAccess = dwAccess
849 if aHandle is not None and dwAccess is None:
850 msg = "Missing access flags for process handle: %x" % aHandle
851 raise TypeError(msg)
852
853 def get_pid(self):
854 """
855 @rtype: int
856 @return: Process global ID.
857 """
858 return GetProcessId(self.value)
859
860
861class ThreadHandle(Handle):
862 """
863 Win32 thread handle.
864
865 @type dwAccess: int
866 @ivar dwAccess: Current access flags to this handle.
867 This is the same value passed to L{OpenThread}.
868 Can only be C{None} if C{aHandle} is also C{None}.
869 Defaults to L{THREAD_ALL_ACCESS}.
870
871 @see: L{Handle}
872 """
873
874 def __init__(self, aHandle=None, bOwnership=True, dwAccess=THREAD_ALL_ACCESS):
875 """
876 @type aHandle: int
877 @param aHandle: Win32 handle value.
878
879 @type bOwnership: bool
880 @param bOwnership:
881 C{True} if we own the handle and we need to close it.
882 C{False} if someone else will be calling L{CloseHandle}.
883
884 @type dwAccess: int
885 @param dwAccess: Current access flags to this handle.
886 This is the same value passed to L{OpenThread}.
887 Can only be C{None} if C{aHandle} is also C{None}.
888 Defaults to L{THREAD_ALL_ACCESS}.
889 """
890 super(ThreadHandle, self).__init__(aHandle, bOwnership)
891 self.dwAccess = dwAccess
892 if aHandle is not None and dwAccess is None:
893 msg = "Missing access flags for thread handle: %x" % aHandle
894 raise TypeError(msg)
895
896 def get_tid(self):
897 """
898 @rtype: int
899 @return: Thread global ID.
900 """
901 return GetThreadId(self.value)
902
903
904class FileHandle(Handle):
905 """
906 Win32 file handle.
907
908 @see: L{Handle}
909 """
910
911 def get_filename(self):
912 """
913 @rtype: None or str
914 @return: Name of the open file, or C{None} if unavailable.
915 """
916 #
917 # XXX BUG
918 #
919 # This code truncates the first two bytes of the path.
920 # It seems to be the expected behavior of NtQueryInformationFile.
921 #
922 # My guess is it only returns the NT pathname, without the device name.
923 # It's like dropping the drive letter in a Win32 pathname.
924 #
925 # Note that using the "official" GetFileInformationByHandleEx
926 # API introduced in Vista doesn't change the results!
927 #
928 dwBufferSize = 0x1004
929 lpFileInformation = ctypes.create_string_buffer(dwBufferSize)
930 try:
931 GetFileInformationByHandleEx(self.value, FILE_INFO_BY_HANDLE_CLASS.FileNameInfo, lpFileInformation, dwBufferSize)
932 except AttributeError:
933 from winappdbg.win32.ntdll import NtQueryInformationFile, FileNameInformation, FILE_NAME_INFORMATION
934
935 NtQueryInformationFile(self.value, FileNameInformation, lpFileInformation, dwBufferSize)
936 FileName = compat.unicode(lpFileInformation.raw[sizeof(DWORD) :], "U16")
937 FileName = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer(FileName).value
938 if not FileName:
939 FileName = None
940 elif FileName[1:2] != ":":
941 # When the drive letter is missing, we'll assume SYSTEMROOT.
942 # Not a good solution but it could be worse.
943 import os
944
945 FileName = os.environ["SYSTEMROOT"][:2] + FileName
946 return FileName
947
948
949class FileMappingHandle(Handle):
950 """
951 File mapping handle.
952
953 @see: L{Handle}
954 """
955
956 pass
957
958
959# XXX maybe add functions related to the toolhelp snapshots here?
960class SnapshotHandle(Handle):
961 """
962 Toolhelp32 snapshot handle.
963
964 @see: L{Handle}
965 """
966
967 pass
968
969
970# --- Structure wrappers -------------------------------------------------------
971
972
973class ProcessInformation(object):
974 """
975 Process information object returned by L{CreateProcess}.
976 """
977
978 def __init__(self, pi):
979 self.hProcess = ProcessHandle(pi.hProcess)
980 self.hThread = ThreadHandle(pi.hThread)
981 self.dwProcessId = pi.dwProcessId
982 self.dwThreadId = pi.dwThreadId
983
984
985# Don't psyco-optimize this class because it needs to be serialized.
986class MemoryBasicInformation(object):
987 """
988 Memory information object returned by L{VirtualQueryEx}.
989 """
990
991 READABLE = PAGE_EXECUTE_READ | PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE | PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY | PAGE_READONLY | PAGE_READWRITE | PAGE_WRITECOPY
992
993 WRITEABLE = PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE | PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY | PAGE_READWRITE | PAGE_WRITECOPY
994
995 COPY_ON_WRITE = PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY | PAGE_WRITECOPY
996
997 EXECUTABLE = PAGE_EXECUTE | PAGE_EXECUTE_READ | PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE | PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY
998
999 EXECUTABLE_AND_WRITEABLE = PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE | PAGE_EXECUTE_WRITECOPY
1000
1001 def __init__(self, mbi=None):
1002 """
1003 @type mbi: L{MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION} or L{MemoryBasicInformation}
1004 @param mbi: Either a L{MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION} structure or another
1005 L{MemoryBasicInformation} instance.
1006 """
1007 if mbi is None:
1008 self.BaseAddress = None
1009 self.AllocationBase = None
1010 self.AllocationProtect = None
1011 self.RegionSize = None
1012 self.State = None
1013 self.Protect = None
1014 self.Type = None
1015 else:
1016 self.BaseAddress = mbi.BaseAddress
1017 self.AllocationBase = mbi.AllocationBase
1018 self.AllocationProtect = mbi.AllocationProtect
1019 self.RegionSize = mbi.RegionSize
1020 self.State = mbi.State
1021 self.Protect = mbi.Protect
1022 self.Type = mbi.Type
1023
1024 # Only used when copying MemoryBasicInformation objects, instead of
1025 # instancing them from a MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION structure.
1026 if hasattr(mbi, "content"):
1027 self.content = mbi.content
1028 if hasattr(mbi, "filename"):
1029 self.content = mbi.filename
1030
1031 def __contains__(self, address):
1032 """
1033 Test if the given memory address falls within this memory region.
1034
1035 @type address: int
1036 @param address: Memory address to test.
1037
1038 @rtype: bool
1039 @return: C{True} if the given memory address falls within this memory
1040 region, C{False} otherwise.
1041 """
1042 return self.BaseAddress <= address < (self.BaseAddress + self.RegionSize)
1043
1044 def is_free(self):
1045 """
1046 @rtype: bool
1047 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region is free.
1048 """
1049 return self.State == MEM_FREE
1050
1051 def is_reserved(self):
1052 """
1053 @rtype: bool
1054 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region is reserved.
1055 """
1056 return self.State == MEM_RESERVE
1057
1058 def is_commited(self):
1059 """
1060 @rtype: bool
1061 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region is commited.
1062 """
1063 return self.State == MEM_COMMIT
1064
1065 def is_image(self):
1066 """
1067 @rtype: bool
1068 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region belongs to an executable
1069 image.
1070 """
1071 return self.Type == MEM_IMAGE
1072
1073 def is_mapped(self):
1074 """
1075 @rtype: bool
1076 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region belongs to a mapped file.
1077 """
1078 return self.Type == MEM_MAPPED
1079
1080 def is_private(self):
1081 """
1082 @rtype: bool
1083 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region is private.
1084 """
1085 return self.Type == MEM_PRIVATE
1086
1087 def is_guard(self):
1088 """
1089 @rtype: bool
1090 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are guard pages.
1091 """
1092 return self.is_commited() and bool(self.Protect & PAGE_GUARD)
1093
1094 def has_content(self):
1095 """
1096 @rtype: bool
1097 @return: C{True} if the memory in this region has any data in it.
1098 """
1099 return self.is_commited() and not bool(self.Protect & (PAGE_GUARD | PAGE_NOACCESS))
1100
1101 def is_readable(self):
1102 """
1103 @rtype: bool
1104 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are readable.
1105 """
1106 return self.has_content() and bool(self.Protect & self.READABLE)
1107
1108 def is_writeable(self):
1109 """
1110 @rtype: bool
1111 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are writeable.
1112 """
1113 return self.has_content() and bool(self.Protect & self.WRITEABLE)
1114
1115 def is_copy_on_write(self):
1116 """
1117 @rtype: bool
1118 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are marked as
1119 copy-on-write. This means the pages are writeable, but changes
1120 are not propagated to disk.
1121 @note:
1122 Tipically data sections in executable images are marked like this.
1123 """
1124 return self.has_content() and bool(self.Protect & self.COPY_ON_WRITE)
1125
1126 def is_executable(self):
1127 """
1128 @rtype: bool
1129 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are executable.
1130 @note: Executable pages are always readable.
1131 """
1132 return self.has_content() and bool(self.Protect & self.EXECUTABLE)
1133
1134 def is_executable_and_writeable(self):
1135 """
1136 @rtype: bool
1137 @return: C{True} if all pages in this region are executable and
1138 writeable.
1139 @note: The presence of such pages make memory corruption
1140 vulnerabilities much easier to exploit.
1141 """
1142 return self.has_content() and bool(self.Protect & self.EXECUTABLE_AND_WRITEABLE)
1143
1144
1145class ProcThreadAttributeList(object):
1146 """
1147 Extended process and thread attribute support.
1148
1149 To be used with L{STARTUPINFOEX}.
1150 Only available for Windows Vista and above.
1151
1152 @type AttributeList: list of tuple( int, ctypes-compatible object )
1153 @ivar AttributeList: List of (Attribute, Value) pairs.
1154
1155 @type AttributeListBuffer: L{LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST}
1156 @ivar AttributeListBuffer: Memory buffer used to store the attribute list.
1157 L{InitializeProcThreadAttributeList},
1158 L{UpdateProcThreadAttribute},
1159 L{DeleteProcThreadAttributeList} and
1160 L{STARTUPINFOEX}.
1161 """
1162
1163 def __init__(self, AttributeList):
1164 """
1165 @type AttributeList: list of tuple( int, ctypes-compatible object )
1166 @param AttributeList: List of (Attribute, Value) pairs.
1167 """
1168 self.AttributeList = AttributeList
1169 self.AttributeListBuffer = InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(len(AttributeList))
1170 try:
1171 for Attribute, Value in AttributeList:
1172 UpdateProcThreadAttribute(self.AttributeListBuffer, Attribute, Value)
1173 except:
1174 ProcThreadAttributeList.__del__(self)
1175 raise
1176
1177 def __del__(self):
1178 try:
1179 DeleteProcThreadAttributeList(self.AttributeListBuffer)
1180 del self.AttributeListBuffer
1181 except Exception:
1182 pass
1183
1184 def __copy__(self):
1185 return self.__deepcopy__()
1186
1187 def __deepcopy__(self):
1188 return self.__class__(self.AttributeList)
1189
1190 @property
1191 def value(self):
1192 return ctypes.cast(ctypes.pointer(self.AttributeListBuffer), LPVOID)
1193
1194 @property
1195 def _as_parameter_(self):
1196 return self.value
1197
1198 # XXX TODO
1199 @staticmethod
1200 def from_param(value):
1201 raise NotImplementedError()
1202
1203
1204# --- OVERLAPPED structure -----------------------------------------------------
1205
1206
1207# typedef struct _OVERLAPPED {
1208# ULONG_PTR Internal;
1209# ULONG_PTR InternalHigh;
1210# union {
1211# struct {
1212# DWORD Offset;
1213# DWORD OffsetHigh;
1214# } ;
1215# PVOID Pointer;
1216# } ;
1217# HANDLE hEvent;
1218# }OVERLAPPED, *LPOVERLAPPED;
1219class _OVERLAPPED_STRUCT(Structure):
1220 _fields_ = [
1221 ("Offset", DWORD),
1222 ("OffsetHigh", DWORD),
1223 ]
1224
1225
1226class _OVERLAPPED_UNION(Union):
1227 _fields_ = [
1228 ("s", _OVERLAPPED_STRUCT),
1229 ("Pointer", PVOID),
1230 ]
1231
1232
1233class OVERLAPPED(Structure):
1234 _fields_ = [
1235 ("Internal", ULONG_PTR),
1236 ("InternalHigh", ULONG_PTR),
1237 ("u", _OVERLAPPED_UNION),
1238 ("hEvent", HANDLE),
1239 ]
1240
1241
1242LPOVERLAPPED = POINTER(OVERLAPPED)
1243
1244# --- SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES structure --------------------------------------------
1245
1246
1247# typedef struct _SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES {
1248# DWORD nLength;
1249# LPVOID lpSecurityDescriptor;
1250# BOOL bInheritHandle;
1251# } SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES, *PSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES, *LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES;
1252class SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES(Structure):
1253 _fields_ = [
1254 ("nLength", DWORD),
1255 ("lpSecurityDescriptor", LPVOID),
1256 ("bInheritHandle", BOOL),
1257 ]
1258
1259
1260LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES = POINTER(SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES)
1261
1262# --- Extended process and thread attribute support ---------------------------
1263
1264PPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST = LPVOID
1265LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST = PPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST
1266
1267PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER = 0x0000FFFF
1268PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_THREAD = 0x00010000 # Attribute may be used with thread creation
1269PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT = 0x00020000 # Attribute is input only
1270PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_ADDITIVE = 0x00040000 # Attribute may be "accumulated," e.g. bitmasks, counters, etc.
1271
1272# PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_NUM
1273ProcThreadAttributeParentProcess = 0
1274ProcThreadAttributeExtendedFlags = 1
1275ProcThreadAttributeHandleList = 2
1276ProcThreadAttributeGroupAffinity = 3
1277ProcThreadAttributePreferredNode = 4
1278ProcThreadAttributeIdealProcessor = 5
1279ProcThreadAttributeUmsThread = 6
1280ProcThreadAttributeMitigationPolicy = 7
1281ProcThreadAttributeMax = 8
1282
1283PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_PARENT_PROCESS = ProcThreadAttributeParentProcess | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1284PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_EXTENDED_FLAGS = ProcThreadAttributeExtendedFlags | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_ADDITIVE
1285PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_HANDLE_LIST = ProcThreadAttributeHandleList | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1286PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_GROUP_AFFINITY = ProcThreadAttributeGroupAffinity | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_THREAD | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1287PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_PREFERRED_NODE = ProcThreadAttributePreferredNode | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1288PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_IDEAL_PROCESSOR = ProcThreadAttributeIdealProcessor | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_THREAD | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1289PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_UMS_THREAD = ProcThreadAttributeUmsThread | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_THREAD | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1290PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_MITIGATION_POLICY = ProcThreadAttributeMitigationPolicy | PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_INPUT
1291
1292PROCESS_CREATION_MITIGATION_POLICY_DEP_ENABLE = 0x01
1293PROCESS_CREATION_MITIGATION_POLICY_DEP_ATL_THUNK_ENABLE = 0x02
1294PROCESS_CREATION_MITIGATION_POLICY_SEHOP_ENABLE = 0x04
1295
1296# --- VS_FIXEDFILEINFO structure -----------------------------------------------
1297
1298
1299# struct VS_FIXEDFILEINFO {
1300# DWORD dwSignature;
1301# DWORD dwStrucVersion;
1302# DWORD dwFileVersionMS;
1303# DWORD dwFileVersionLS;
1304# DWORD dwProductVersionMS;
1305# DWORD dwProductVersionLS;
1306# DWORD dwFileFlagsMask;
1307# DWORD dwFileFlags;
1308# DWORD dwFileOS;
1309# DWORD dwFileType;
1310# DWORD dwFileSubtype;
1311# DWORD dwFileDateMS;
1312# DWORD dwFileDateLS;
1313# };
1314class VS_FIXEDFILEINFO(Structure):
1315 _fields_ = [
1316 ("dwSignature", DWORD), # 0xFEEF04BD
1317 ("dwStrucVersion", DWORD),
1318 ("dwFileVersionMS", DWORD),
1319 ("dwFileVersionLS", DWORD),
1320 ("dwProductVersionMS", DWORD),
1321 ("dwProductVersionLS", DWORD),
1322 ("dwFileFlagsMask", DWORD),
1323 ("dwFileFlags", DWORD),
1324 ("dwFileOS", DWORD),
1325 ("dwFileType", DWORD),
1326 ("dwFileSubtype", DWORD),
1327 ("dwFileDateMS", DWORD),
1328 ("dwFileDateLS", DWORD),
1329 ]
1330
1331
1332# --- THREADNAME_INFO structure ------------------------------------------------
1333
1334
1335# typedef struct tagTHREADNAME_INFO
1336# {
1337# DWORD dwType; // Must be 0x1000.
1338# LPCSTR szName; // Pointer to name (in user addr space).
1339# DWORD dwThreadID; // Thread ID (-1=caller thread).
1340# DWORD dwFlags; // Reserved for future use, must be zero.
1341# } THREADNAME_INFO;
1342class THREADNAME_INFO(Structure):
1343 _fields_ = [
1344 ("dwType", DWORD), # 0x1000
1345 ("szName", LPVOID), # remote pointer
1346 ("dwThreadID", DWORD), # -1 usually
1347 ("dwFlags", DWORD), # 0
1348 ]
1349
1350
1351# --- MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION structure ---------------------------------------
1352
1353
1354# typedef struct _MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION32 {
1355# DWORD BaseAddress;
1356# DWORD AllocationBase;
1357# DWORD AllocationProtect;
1358# DWORD RegionSize;
1359# DWORD State;
1360# DWORD Protect;
1361# DWORD Type;
1362# } MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION32, *PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION32;
1363class MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION32(Structure):
1364 _fields_ = [
1365 ("BaseAddress", DWORD), # remote pointer
1366 ("AllocationBase", DWORD), # remote pointer
1367 ("AllocationProtect", DWORD),
1368 ("RegionSize", DWORD),
1369 ("State", DWORD),
1370 ("Protect", DWORD),
1371 ("Type", DWORD),
1372 ]
1373
1374
1375# typedef struct DECLSPEC_ALIGN(16) _MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION64 {
1376# ULONGLONG BaseAddress;
1377# ULONGLONG AllocationBase;
1378# DWORD AllocationProtect;
1379# DWORD __alignment1;
1380# ULONGLONG RegionSize;
1381# DWORD State;
1382# DWORD Protect;
1383# DWORD Type;
1384# DWORD __alignment2;
1385# } MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION64, *PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION64;
1386class MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION64(Structure):
1387 _fields_ = [
1388 ("BaseAddress", ULONGLONG), # remote pointer
1389 ("AllocationBase", ULONGLONG), # remote pointer
1390 ("AllocationProtect", DWORD),
1391 ("__alignment1", DWORD),
1392 ("RegionSize", ULONGLONG),
1393 ("State", DWORD),
1394 ("Protect", DWORD),
1395 ("Type", DWORD),
1396 ("__alignment2", DWORD),
1397 ]
1398
1399
1400# typedef struct _MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION {
1401# PVOID BaseAddress;
1402# PVOID AllocationBase;
1403# DWORD AllocationProtect;
1404# SIZE_T RegionSize;
1405# DWORD State;
1406# DWORD Protect;
1407# DWORD Type;
1408# } MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION, *PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION;
1409class MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION(Structure):
1410 _fields_ = [
1411 ("BaseAddress", SIZE_T), # remote pointer
1412 ("AllocationBase", SIZE_T), # remote pointer
1413 ("AllocationProtect", DWORD),
1414 ("RegionSize", SIZE_T),
1415 ("State", DWORD),
1416 ("Protect", DWORD),
1417 ("Type", DWORD),
1418 ]
1419
1420
1421PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION = POINTER(MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION)
1422

1473# DWORD nFileSizeLow;

1475# DWORD nFileIndexHigh;
1476# DWORD nFileIndexLow;
1477# } BY_HANDLE_FILE_INFORMATION, *PBY_HANDLE_FILE_INFORMATION;

1485 ("nFileSizeHigh", DWORD),

1488 ("nFileIndexHigh", DWORD),
1489 ("nFileIndexLow", DWORD),
1490 ]

1496# typedef enum _FILE_INFO_BY_HANDLE_CLASS {
1497# FileBasicInfo = 0,
1498# FileStandardInfo = 1,
1499# FileNameInfo = 2,
1500# FileRenameInfo = 3,
1501# FileDispositionInfo = 4,
1502# FileAllocationInfo = 5,
1503# FileEndOfFileInfo = 6,
1504# FileStreamInfo = 7,
1505# FileCompressionInfo = 8,
1506# FileAttributeTagInfo = 9,
1507# FileIdBothDirectoryInfo = 10,
1508# FileIdBothDirectoryRestartInfo = 11,
1509# FileIoPriorityHintInfo = 12,
1510# MaximumFileInfoByHandlesClass = 13
1511# } FILE_INFO_BY_HANDLE_CLASS, *PFILE_INFO_BY_HANDLE_CLASS;
1512class FILE_INFO_BY_HANDLE_CLASS(object):
1513 FileBasicInfo = 0
1514 FileStandardInfo = 1
1515 FileNameInfo = 2
1516 FileRenameInfo = 3
1517 FileDispositionInfo = 4
1518 FileAllocationInfo = 5
1519 FileEndOfFileInfo = 6
1520 FileStreamInfo = 7
1521 FileCompressionInfo = 8
1522 FileAttributeTagInfo = 9
1523 FileIdBothDirectoryInfo = 10
1524 FileIdBothDirectoryRestartInfo = 11
1525 FileIoPriorityHintInfo = 12
1526 MaximumFileInfoByHandlesClass = 13
1527
1528

1530# DWORD FileNameLength;
1531# WCHAR FileName[1];
1532# } FILE_NAME_INFO, *PFILE_NAME_INFO;
1533
1538

1542

1546# HANDLE hThread;

1548# DWORD dwThreadId;

1554 ("dwProcessId", DWORD),
1555 ("dwThreadId", DWORD),
1556 ]
1557
1558
1559LPPROCESS_INFORMATION = POINTER(PROCESS_INFORMATION)

1561# --- STARTUPINFO and STARTUPINFOEX structures ---------------------------------
1562
1563
1564# typedef struct _STARTUPINFO {
1565# DWORD cb;
1566# LPTSTR lpReserved;
1567# LPTSTR lpDesktop;
1568# LPTSTR lpTitle;
1569# DWORD dwX;
1570# DWORD dwY;
1571# DWORD dwXSize;
1572# DWORD dwYSize;
1573# DWORD dwXCountChars;
1574# DWORD dwYCountChars;
1575# DWORD dwFillAttribute;
1576# DWORD dwFlags;
1577# WORD wShowWindow;
1578# WORD cbReserved2;
1579# LPBYTE lpReserved2;
1580# HANDLE hStdInput;
1581# HANDLE hStdOutput;
1582# HANDLE hStdError;
1583# }STARTUPINFO, *LPSTARTUPINFO;
1584class STARTUPINFO(Structure):
1585 _fields_ = [
1586 ("cb", DWORD),
1587 ("lpReserved", LPSTR),
1588 ("lpDesktop", LPSTR),
1589 ("lpTitle", LPSTR),
1590 ("dwX", DWORD),
1591 ("dwY", DWORD),
1592 ("dwXSize", DWORD),
1593 ("dwYSize", DWORD),
1594 ("dwXCountChars", DWORD),
1595 ("dwYCountChars", DWORD),
1596 ("dwFillAttribute", DWORD),
1597 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
1598 ("wShowWindow", WORD),
1599 ("cbReserved2", WORD),
1600 ("lpReserved2", LPVOID), # LPBYTE
1601 ("hStdInput", HANDLE),
1602 ("hStdOutput", HANDLE),
1603 ("hStdError", HANDLE),
1604 ]
1605
1606
1607LPSTARTUPINFO = POINTER(STARTUPINFO)
1608
1609
1610# typedef struct _STARTUPINFOEX {
1611# STARTUPINFO StartupInfo;
1612# PPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST lpAttributeList;
1613# } STARTUPINFOEX, *LPSTARTUPINFOEX;
1614class STARTUPINFOEX(Structure):
1615 _fields_ = [
1616 ("StartupInfo", STARTUPINFO),
1617 ("lpAttributeList", PPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST),
1618 ]
1619
1620
1621LPSTARTUPINFOEX = POINTER(STARTUPINFOEX)
1622
1623
1624class STARTUPINFOW(Structure):
1625 _fields_ = [
1626 ("cb", DWORD),
1627 ("lpReserved", LPWSTR),
1628 ("lpDesktop", LPWSTR),
1629 ("lpTitle", LPWSTR),
1630 ("dwX", DWORD),
1631 ("dwY", DWORD),
1632 ("dwXSize", DWORD),
1633 ("dwYSize", DWORD),
1634 ("dwXCountChars", DWORD),
1635 ("dwYCountChars", DWORD),
1636 ("dwFillAttribute", DWORD),
1637 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
1638 ("wShowWindow", WORD),
1639 ("cbReserved2", WORD),
1640 ("lpReserved2", LPVOID), # LPBYTE
1641 ("hStdInput", HANDLE),
1642 ("hStdOutput", HANDLE),
1643 ("hStdError", HANDLE),
1644 ]
1645
1646
1647LPSTARTUPINFOW = POINTER(STARTUPINFOW)
1648
1649
1650class STARTUPINFOEXW(Structure):

1653 ("lpAttributeList", PPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST),
1654 ]
1655

1657LPSTARTUPINFOEXW = POINTER(STARTUPINFOEXW)

1693# typedef struct _EXCEPTION_RECORD32 {

1697# DWORD ExceptionAddress;
1698# DWORD NumberParameters;

1700# } EXCEPTION_RECORD32, *PEXCEPTION_RECORD32;

1703 ("ExceptionCode", DWORD),
1704 ("ExceptionFlags", DWORD),
1705 ("ExceptionRecord", DWORD),
1706 ("ExceptionAddress", DWORD),
1707 ("NumberParameters", DWORD),
1708 ("ExceptionInformation", DWORD * EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS),
1709 ]
1710
1711

1713
1714
1715# typedef struct _EXCEPTION_RECORD64 {
1716# DWORD ExceptionCode;
1717# DWORD ExceptionFlags;
1718# DWORD64 ExceptionRecord;
1719# DWORD64 ExceptionAddress;
1720# DWORD NumberParameters;
1721# DWORD __unusedAlignment;
1722# DWORD64 ExceptionInformation[EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS];
1723# } EXCEPTION_RECORD64, *PEXCEPTION_RECORD64;

1726 ("ExceptionCode", DWORD),
1727 ("ExceptionFlags", DWORD),
1728 ("ExceptionRecord", DWORD64),
1729 ("ExceptionAddress", DWORD64),
1730 ("NumberParameters", DWORD),

1732 ("ExceptionInformation", DWORD64 * EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS),
1733 ]
1734
1735
1736PEXCEPTION_RECORD64 = POINTER(EXCEPTION_RECORD64)
1737
1738
1739# typedef struct _EXCEPTION_RECORD {
1740# DWORD ExceptionCode;
1741# DWORD ExceptionFlags;
1742# LPVOID ExceptionRecord;
1743# LPVOID ExceptionAddress;
1744# DWORD NumberParameters;
1745# LPVOID ExceptionInformation[EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS];
1746# } EXCEPTION_RECORD, *PEXCEPTION_RECORD;
1747class EXCEPTION_RECORD(Structure):
1748 pass
1749
1750
1751PEXCEPTION_RECORD = POINTER(EXCEPTION_RECORD)

1753 ("ExceptionCode", DWORD),
1754 ("ExceptionFlags", DWORD),
1755 ("ExceptionRecord", PEXCEPTION_RECORD),
1756 ("ExceptionAddress", LPVOID),
1757 ("NumberParameters", DWORD),
1758 ("ExceptionInformation", LPVOID * EXCEPTION_MAXIMUM_PARAMETERS),
1759]
1760
1761

1872# typedef struct _RIP_INFO {
1873# DWORD dwError;
1874# DWORD dwType;
1875# } RIP_INFO, *LPRIP_INFO;
1876class RIP_INFO(Structure):

1878 ("dwError", DWORD),
1879 ("dwType", DWORD),
1880 ]
1881
1882
1883# typedef struct _DEBUG_EVENT {
1884# DWORD dwDebugEventCode;
1885# DWORD dwProcessId;
1886# DWORD dwThreadId;
1887# union {
1888# EXCEPTION_DEBUG_INFO Exception;
1889# CREATE_THREAD_DEBUG_INFO CreateThread;
1890# CREATE_PROCESS_DEBUG_INFO CreateProcessInfo;
1891# EXIT_THREAD_DEBUG_INFO ExitThread;
1892# EXIT_PROCESS_DEBUG_INFO ExitProcess;
1893# LOAD_DLL_DEBUG_INFO LoadDll;
1894# UNLOAD_DLL_DEBUG_INFO UnloadDll;
1895# OUTPUT_DEBUG_STRING_INFO DebugString;
1896# RIP_INFO RipInfo;
1897# } u;
1898# } DEBUG_EVENT;.
1899class _DEBUG_EVENT_UNION_(Union):
1900 _fields_ = [
1901 ("Exception", EXCEPTION_DEBUG_INFO),
1902 ("CreateThread", CREATE_THREAD_DEBUG_INFO),
1903 ("CreateProcessInfo", CREATE_PROCESS_DEBUG_INFO),
1904 ("ExitThread", EXIT_THREAD_DEBUG_INFO),
1905 ("ExitProcess", EXIT_PROCESS_DEBUG_INFO),
1906 ("LoadDll", LOAD_DLL_DEBUG_INFO),
1907 ("UnloadDll", UNLOAD_DLL_DEBUG_INFO),
1908 ("DebugString", OUTPUT_DEBUG_STRING_INFO),
1909 ("RipInfo", RIP_INFO),
1910 ]
1911
1912
1913class DEBUG_EVENT(Structure):
1914 _fields_ = [
1915 ("dwDebugEventCode", DWORD),
1916 ("dwProcessId", DWORD),
1917 ("dwThreadId", DWORD),
1918 ("u", _DEBUG_EVENT_UNION_),
1919 ]
1920
1921
1922LPDEBUG_EVENT = POINTER(DEBUG_EVENT)
1923
1924# --- Console API defines and structures ---------------------------------------
1925
1926FOREGROUND_MASK = 0x000F
1927BACKGROUND_MASK = 0x00F0
1928COMMON_LVB_MASK = 0xFF00
1929
1930FOREGROUND_BLACK = 0x0000
1931FOREGROUND_BLUE = 0x0001
1932FOREGROUND_GREEN = 0x0002
1933FOREGROUND_CYAN = 0x0003
1934FOREGROUND_RED = 0x0004
1935FOREGROUND_MAGENTA = 0x0005
1936FOREGROUND_YELLOW = 0x0006
1937FOREGROUND_GREY = 0x0007
1938FOREGROUND_INTENSITY = 0x0008
1939
1940BACKGROUND_BLACK = 0x0000
1941BACKGROUND_BLUE = 0x0010
1942BACKGROUND_GREEN = 0x0020
1943BACKGROUND_CYAN = 0x0030
1944BACKGROUND_RED = 0x0040
1945BACKGROUND_MAGENTA = 0x0050
1946BACKGROUND_YELLOW = 0x0060
1947BACKGROUND_GREY = 0x0070
1948BACKGROUND_INTENSITY = 0x0080
1949
1950COMMON_LVB_LEADING_BYTE = 0x0100
1951COMMON_LVB_TRAILING_BYTE = 0x0200
1952COMMON_LVB_GRID_HORIZONTAL = 0x0400
1953COMMON_LVB_GRID_LVERTICAL = 0x0800
1954COMMON_LVB_GRID_RVERTICAL = 0x1000
1955COMMON_LVB_REVERSE_VIDEO = 0x4000
1956COMMON_LVB_UNDERSCORE = 0x8000
1957
1958
1959# typedef struct _CHAR_INFO {
1960# union {
1961# WCHAR UnicodeChar;
1962# CHAR AsciiChar;
1963# } Char;
1964# WORD Attributes;
1965# } CHAR_INFO, *PCHAR_INFO;

1968 ("UnicodeChar", WCHAR),
1969 ("AsciiChar", CHAR),
1970 ]
1971
1972
1973class CHAR_INFO(Structure):

1975 ("Char", _CHAR_INFO_CHAR),
1976 ("Attributes", WORD),
1977 ]
1978
1979
1980PCHAR_INFO = POINTER(CHAR_INFO)
1981

2034# --- Toolhelp library defines and structures ----------------------------------
2035
2036TH32CS_SNAPHEAPLIST = 0x00000001
2037TH32CS_SNAPPROCESS = 0x00000002
2038TH32CS_SNAPTHREAD = 0x00000004
2039TH32CS_SNAPMODULE = 0x00000008
2040TH32CS_INHERIT = 0x80000000
2041TH32CS_SNAPALL = TH32CS_SNAPHEAPLIST | TH32CS_SNAPPROCESS | TH32CS_SNAPTHREAD | TH32CS_SNAPMODULE
2042
2043
2044# typedef struct tagTHREADENTRY32 {
2045# DWORD dwSize;
2046# DWORD cntUsage;
2047# DWORD th32ThreadID;
2048# DWORD th32OwnerProcessID;
2049# LONG tpBasePri;
2050# LONG tpDeltaPri;
2051# DWORD dwFlags;
2052# } THREADENTRY32, *PTHREADENTRY32;
2053class THREADENTRY32(Structure):
2054 _fields_ = [
2055 ("dwSize", DWORD),
2056 ("cntUsage", DWORD),
2057 ("th32ThreadID", DWORD),
2058 ("th32OwnerProcessID", DWORD),
2059 ("tpBasePri", LONG),
2060 ("tpDeltaPri", LONG),
2061 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
2062 ]
2063
2064
2065LPTHREADENTRY32 = POINTER(THREADENTRY32)
2066
2067
2068# typedef struct tagPROCESSENTRY32 {
2069# DWORD dwSize;
2070# DWORD cntUsage;
2071# DWORD th32ProcessID;
2072# ULONG_PTR th32DefaultHeapID;
2073# DWORD th32ModuleID;
2074# DWORD cntThreads;
2075# DWORD th32ParentProcessID;
2076# LONG pcPriClassBase;
2077# DWORD dwFlags;
2078# TCHAR szExeFile[MAX_PATH];
2079# } PROCESSENTRY32, *PPROCESSENTRY32;
2080class PROCESSENTRY32(Structure):
2081 _fields_ = [
2082 ("dwSize", DWORD),
2083 ("cntUsage", DWORD),
2084 ("th32ProcessID", DWORD),
2085 ("th32DefaultHeapID", ULONG_PTR),
2086 ("th32ModuleID", DWORD),
2087 ("cntThreads", DWORD),
2088 ("th32ParentProcessID", DWORD),
2089 ("pcPriClassBase", LONG),
2090 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
2091 ("szExeFile", TCHAR * 260),
2092 ]
2093
2094
2095LPPROCESSENTRY32 = POINTER(PROCESSENTRY32)
2096
2097
2098# typedef struct tagMODULEENTRY32 {
2099# DWORD dwSize;
2100# DWORD th32ModuleID;
2101# DWORD th32ProcessID;
2102# DWORD GlblcntUsage;
2103# DWORD ProccntUsage;
2104# BYTE* modBaseAddr;
2105# DWORD modBaseSize;
2106# HMODULE hModule;
2107# TCHAR szModule[MAX_MODULE_NAME32 + 1];
2108# TCHAR szExePath[MAX_PATH];
2109# } MODULEENTRY32, *PMODULEENTRY32;
2110class MODULEENTRY32(Structure):
2111 _fields_ = [
2112 ("dwSize", DWORD),
2113 ("th32ModuleID", DWORD),
2114 ("th32ProcessID", DWORD),
2115 ("GlblcntUsage", DWORD),
2116 ("ProccntUsage", DWORD),
2117 ("modBaseAddr", LPVOID), # BYTE*
2118 ("modBaseSize", DWORD),
2119 ("hModule", HMODULE),
2120 ("szModule", TCHAR * (MAX_MODULE_NAME32 + 1)),
2121 ("szExePath", TCHAR * MAX_PATH),
2122 ]
2123
2124
2125LPMODULEENTRY32 = POINTER(MODULEENTRY32)
2126
2127
2128# typedef struct tagHEAPENTRY32 {
2129# SIZE_T dwSize;
2130# HANDLE hHandle;
2131# ULONG_PTR dwAddress;
2132# SIZE_T dwBlockSize;
2133# DWORD dwFlags;
2134# DWORD dwLockCount;
2135# DWORD dwResvd;
2136# DWORD th32ProcessID;
2137# ULONG_PTR th32HeapID;
2138# } HEAPENTRY32,
2139# *PHEAPENTRY32;
2140class HEAPENTRY32(Structure):
2141 _fields_ = [
2142 ("dwSize", SIZE_T),
2143 ("hHandle", HANDLE),
2144 ("dwAddress", ULONG_PTR),
2145 ("dwBlockSize", SIZE_T),
2146 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
2147 ("dwLockCount", DWORD),
2148 ("dwResvd", DWORD),
2149 ("th32ProcessID", DWORD),
2150 ("th32HeapID", ULONG_PTR),
2151 ]
2152
2153
2154LPHEAPENTRY32 = POINTER(HEAPENTRY32)
2155
2156
2157# typedef struct tagHEAPLIST32 {
2158# SIZE_T dwSize;
2159# DWORD th32ProcessID;
2160# ULONG_PTR th32HeapID;
2161# DWORD dwFlags;
2162# } HEAPLIST32,
2163# *PHEAPLIST32;

2165 _fields_ = [
2166 ("dwSize", SIZE_T),
2167 ("th32ProcessID", DWORD),
2168 ("th32HeapID", ULONG_PTR),
2169 ("dwFlags", DWORD),
2170 ]
2171
2172
2173LPHEAPLIST32 = POINTER(HEAPLIST32)

2237# BOOL WINAPI CloseHandle(
2238# __in HANDLE hObject
2239# );
2240def CloseHandle(hHandle):
2241 if isinstance(hHandle, Handle):
2242 # Prevents the handle from being closed without notifying the Handle object.
2243 hHandle.close()
2244 else:
2245 _CloseHandle = windll.kernel32.CloseHandle
2246 _CloseHandle.argtypes = [HANDLE]
2247 _CloseHandle.restype = bool
2248 _CloseHandle.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2249 _CloseHandle(hHandle)
2250
2251
2252# BOOL WINAPI DuplicateHandle(
2253# __in HANDLE hSourceProcessHandle,
2254# __in HANDLE hSourceHandle,
2255# __in HANDLE hTargetProcessHandle,
2256# __out LPHANDLE lpTargetHandle,
2257# __in DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
2258# __in BOOL bInheritHandle,
2259# __in DWORD dwOptions
2260# );
2261def DuplicateHandle(
2262 hSourceHandle,
2263 hSourceProcessHandle=None,
2264 hTargetProcessHandle=None,
2265 dwDesiredAccess=STANDARD_RIGHTS_ALL,
2266 bInheritHandle=False,
2267 dwOptions=DUPLICATE_SAME_ACCESS,
2268):
2269 _DuplicateHandle = windll.kernel32.DuplicateHandle
2270 _DuplicateHandle.argtypes = [HANDLE, HANDLE, HANDLE, LPHANDLE, DWORD, BOOL, DWORD]
2271 _DuplicateHandle.restype = bool
2272 _DuplicateHandle.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2273
2274 # NOTE: the arguments to this function are in a different order,
2275 # so we can set default values for all of them but one (hSourceHandle).
2276
2277 if hSourceProcessHandle is None:
2278 hSourceProcessHandle = GetCurrentProcess()
2279 if hTargetProcessHandle is None:
2280 hTargetProcessHandle = hSourceProcessHandle
2281 lpTargetHandle = HANDLE(INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE)
2282 _DuplicateHandle(
2283 hSourceProcessHandle, hSourceHandle, hTargetProcessHandle, byref(lpTargetHandle), dwDesiredAccess, bool(bInheritHandle), dwOptions
2284 )
2285 if isinstance(hSourceHandle, Handle):
2286 HandleClass = hSourceHandle.__class__
2287 else:
2288 HandleClass = Handle
2289 if hasattr(hSourceHandle, "dwAccess"):
2290 return HandleClass(lpTargetHandle.value, dwAccess=hSourceHandle.dwAccess)
2291 else:
2292 return HandleClass(lpTargetHandle.value)
2293
2294
2295# HLOCAL WINAPI LocalFree(
2296# __in HLOCAL hMem
2297# );
2298def LocalFree(hMem):
2299 _LocalFree = windll.kernel32.LocalFree
2300 _LocalFree.argtypes = [HLOCAL]
2301 _LocalFree.restype = HLOCAL
2302
2303 result = _LocalFree(hMem)
2304 if result != NULL:
2305 ctypes.WinError()
2306
2307

2419# BOOL WINAPI SetConsoleWindowInfo(
2420# _In_ HANDLE hConsoleOutput,
2421# _In_ BOOL bAbsolute,
2422# _In_ const SMALL_RECT *lpConsoleWindow
2423# );
2424def SetConsoleWindowInfo(hConsoleOutput, bAbsolute, lpConsoleWindow):
2425 _SetConsoleWindowInfo = windll.kernel32.SetConsoleWindowInfo
2426 _SetConsoleWindowInfo.argytpes = [HANDLE, BOOL, PSMALL_RECT]
2427 _SetConsoleWindowInfo.restype = bool
2428 _SetConsoleWindowInfo.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2429
2430 if hConsoleOutput is None:
2431 hConsoleOutput = GetStdHandle(STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE)
2432 if isinstance(lpConsoleWindow, SMALL_RECT):
2433 ConsoleWindow = lpConsoleWindow
2434 else:
2435 ConsoleWindow = SMALL_RECT(*lpConsoleWindow)
2436 _SetConsoleWindowInfo(hConsoleOutput, bAbsolute, byref(ConsoleWindow))

2530# DWORD WINAPI GetDllDirectory(
2531# __in DWORD nBufferLength,
2532# __out LPTSTR lpBuffer
2533# );
2534def GetDllDirectoryA():
2535 _GetDllDirectoryA = windll.kernel32.GetDllDirectoryA
2536 _GetDllDirectoryA.argytpes = [DWORD, LPSTR]
2537 _GetDllDirectoryA.restype = DWORD
2538
2539 nBufferLength = _GetDllDirectoryA(0, None)
2540 if nBufferLength == 0:
2541 return None
2542 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", nBufferLength)
2543 _GetDllDirectoryA(nBufferLength, byref(lpBuffer))
2544 return lpBuffer.value
2545
2546
2547def GetDllDirectoryW():
2548 _GetDllDirectoryW = windll.kernel32.GetDllDirectoryW
2549 _GetDllDirectoryW.argytpes = [DWORD, LPWSTR]
2550 _GetDllDirectoryW.restype = DWORD
2551
2552 nBufferLength = _GetDllDirectoryW(0, None)
2553 if nBufferLength == 0:
2554 return None
2555 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", nBufferLength)
2556 _GetDllDirectoryW(nBufferLength, byref(lpBuffer))
2557 return lpBuffer.value
2558
2559
2560GetDllDirectory = GuessStringType(GetDllDirectoryA, GetDllDirectoryW)
2561
2562

2565# );

2595 return hModule

2602 hModule = _LoadLibraryW(pszLibrary)

2605 return hModule
2606
2607

2639# HMODULE WINAPI GetModuleHandle(
2640# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpModuleName
2641# );
2642def GetModuleHandleA(lpModuleName):
2643 _GetModuleHandleA = windll.kernel32.GetModuleHandleA
2644 _GetModuleHandleA.argtypes = [LPSTR]
2645 _GetModuleHandleA.restype = HMODULE
2646 hModule = _GetModuleHandleA(lpModuleName)
2647 if hModule == NULL:
2648 raise ctypes.WinError()
2649 return hModule
2650
2651
2652def GetModuleHandleW(lpModuleName):
2653 _GetModuleHandleW = windll.kernel32.GetModuleHandleW
2654 _GetModuleHandleW.argtypes = [LPWSTR]
2655 _GetModuleHandleW.restype = HMODULE
2656 hModule = _GetModuleHandleW(lpModuleName)

2663
2664
2665# FARPROC WINAPI GetProcAddress(
2666# __in HMODULE hModule,
2667# __in LPCSTR lpProcName
2668# );
2669def GetProcAddressA(hModule, lpProcName):
2670 _GetProcAddress = windll.kernel32.GetProcAddress
2671 _GetProcAddress.argtypes = [HMODULE, LPVOID]
2672 _GetProcAddress.restype = LPVOID
2673
2674 if type(lpProcName) in (type(0), type(long(0))):
2675 lpProcName = LPVOID(lpProcName)
2676 if lpProcName.value & (~0xFFFF):
2677 raise ValueError("Ordinal number too large: %d" % lpProcName.value)
2678 elif type(lpProcName) == type(compat.b("")):
2679 lpProcName = ctypes.c_char_p(lpProcName)
2680 else:
2681 raise TypeError(str(type(lpProcName)))
2682 return _GetProcAddress(hModule, lpProcName)
2683
2684
2685GetProcAddressW = MakeWideVersion(GetProcAddressA)
2686GetProcAddress = GuessStringType(GetProcAddressA, GetProcAddressW)
2687
2688

2694 _FreeLibrary.argtypes = [HMODULE]
2695 _FreeLibrary.restype = bool
2696 _FreeLibrary.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2697 _FreeLibrary(hModule)

2700# PVOID WINAPI RtlPcToFileHeader(

2702# __out PVOID *BaseOfImage
2703# );
2704def RtlPcToFileHeader(PcValue):
2705 _RtlPcToFileHeader = windll.kernel32.RtlPcToFileHeader
2706 _RtlPcToFileHeader.argtypes = [PVOID, POINTER(PVOID)]
2707 _RtlPcToFileHeader.restype = PRUNTIME_FUNCTION
2708
2709 BaseOfImage = PVOID(0)
2710 _RtlPcToFileHeader(PcValue, byref(BaseOfImage))
2711 return BaseOfImage.value

2725 _GetHandleInformation.restype = bool
2726 _GetHandleInformation.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2727

2730 return dwFlags.value

2734# __in HANDLE hObject,
2735# __in DWORD dwMask,
2736# __in DWORD dwFlags
2737# );
2738def SetHandleInformation(hObject, dwMask, dwFlags):
2739 _SetHandleInformation = windll.kernel32.SetHandleInformation
2740 _SetHandleInformation.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, DWORD]
2741 _SetHandleInformation.restype = bool
2742 _SetHandleInformation.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2743 _SetHandleInformation(hObject, dwMask, dwFlags)
2744
2745
2746# UINT WINAPI GetWindowModuleFileName(
2747# __in HWND hwnd,
2748# __out LPTSTR lpszFileName,
2749# __in UINT cchFileNameMax
2750# );
2751# Not included because it doesn't work in other processes.
2752# See: http://support.microsoft.com/?id=228469
2753
2754
2755# BOOL WINAPI QueryFullProcessImageName(
2756# __in HANDLE hProcess,
2757# __in DWORD dwFlags,
2758# __out LPTSTR lpExeName,
2759# __inout PDWORD lpdwSize
2760# );
2761def QueryFullProcessImageNameA(hProcess, dwFlags=0):
2762 _QueryFullProcessImageNameA = windll.kernel32.QueryFullProcessImageNameA
2763 _QueryFullProcessImageNameA.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, LPSTR, PDWORD]
2764 _QueryFullProcessImageNameA.restype = bool
2765
2766 dwSize = MAX_PATH
2767 while 1:
2768 lpdwSize = DWORD(dwSize)
2769 lpExeName = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", lpdwSize.value + 1)
2770 success = _QueryFullProcessImageNameA(hProcess, dwFlags, lpExeName, byref(lpdwSize))
2771 if success and 0 < lpdwSize.value < dwSize:
2772 break
2773 error = GetLastError()
2774 if error != ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER:
2775 raise ctypes.WinError(error)
2776 dwSize = dwSize + 256
2777 if dwSize > 0x1000:
2778 # this prevents an infinite loop in Windows 2008 when the path has spaces,
2779 # see http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms684919(VS.85).aspx#4
2780 raise ctypes.WinError(error)
2781 return lpExeName.value
2782
2783
2784def QueryFullProcessImageNameW(hProcess, dwFlags=0):
2785 _QueryFullProcessImageNameW = windll.kernel32.QueryFullProcessImageNameW
2786 _QueryFullProcessImageNameW.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, LPWSTR, PDWORD]
2787 _QueryFullProcessImageNameW.restype = bool
2788
2789 dwSize = MAX_PATH
2790 while 1:
2791 lpdwSize = DWORD(dwSize)
2792 lpExeName = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", lpdwSize.value + 1)
2793 success = _QueryFullProcessImageNameW(hProcess, dwFlags, lpExeName, byref(lpdwSize))
2794 if success and 0 < lpdwSize.value < dwSize:
2795 break
2796 error = GetLastError()
2797 if error != ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER:
2798 raise ctypes.WinError(error)
2799 dwSize = dwSize + 256
2800 if dwSize > 0x1000:
2801 # this prevents an infinite loop in Windows 2008 when the path has spaces,
2802 # see http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms684919(VS.85).aspx#4
2803 raise ctypes.WinError(error)
2804 return lpExeName.value
2805
2806
2807QueryFullProcessImageName = GuessStringType(QueryFullProcessImageNameA, QueryFullProcessImageNameW)
2808
2809
2810# DWORD WINAPI GetLogicalDriveStrings(
2811# __in DWORD nBufferLength,
2812# __out LPTSTR lpBuffer
2813# );
2814def GetLogicalDriveStringsA():
2815 _GetLogicalDriveStringsA = ctypes.windll.kernel32.GetLogicalDriveStringsA
2816 _GetLogicalDriveStringsA.argtypes = [DWORD, LPSTR]
2817 _GetLogicalDriveStringsA.restype = DWORD
2818 _GetLogicalDriveStringsA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2819
2820 nBufferLength = (4 * 26) + 1 # "X:\\\0" from A to Z plus empty string
2821 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", nBufferLength)
2822 _GetLogicalDriveStringsA(nBufferLength, lpBuffer)
2823 drive_strings = list()
2824 string_p = addressof(lpBuffer)
2825 sizeof_char = sizeof(ctypes.c_char)
2826 while True:
2827 string_v = ctypes.string_at(string_p)
2828 if string_v == "":
2829 break
2830 drive_strings.append(string_v)
2831 string_p += len(string_v) + sizeof_char
2832 return drive_strings
2833
2834
2835def GetLogicalDriveStringsW():
2836 _GetLogicalDriveStringsW = ctypes.windll.kernel32.GetLogicalDriveStringsW
2837 _GetLogicalDriveStringsW.argtypes = [DWORD, LPWSTR]
2838 _GetLogicalDriveStringsW.restype = DWORD
2839 _GetLogicalDriveStringsW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2840
2841 nBufferLength = (4 * 26) + 1 # "X:\\\0" from A to Z plus empty string
2842 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", nBufferLength)
2843 _GetLogicalDriveStringsW(nBufferLength, lpBuffer)
2844 drive_strings = list()
2845 string_p = addressof(lpBuffer)
2846 sizeof_wchar = sizeof(ctypes.c_wchar)
2847 while True:
2848 string_v = ctypes.wstring_at(string_p)
2849 if string_v == "":
2850 break
2851 drive_strings.append(string_v)
2852 string_p += (len(string_v) * sizeof_wchar) + sizeof_wchar
2853 return drive_strings
2854
2855
2856
2903
2904GetLogicalDriveStrings = GuessStringType(GetLogicalDriveStringsA, GetLogicalDriveStringsW)
2905
2906

2915 _QueryDosDeviceA.restype = DWORD
2916 _QueryDosDeviceA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2917
2918 if not lpDeviceName:
2919 lpDeviceName = None
2920 ucchMax = 0x1000
2921 lpTargetPath = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", ucchMax)
2922 _QueryDosDeviceA(lpDeviceName, lpTargetPath, ucchMax)
2923 return lpTargetPath.value
2924
2925
2926def QueryDosDeviceW(lpDeviceName):
2927 _QueryDosDeviceW = windll.kernel32.QueryDosDeviceW
2928 _QueryDosDeviceW.argtypes = [LPWSTR, LPWSTR, DWORD]
2929 _QueryDosDeviceW.restype = DWORD
2930 _QueryDosDeviceW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2931
2932 if not lpDeviceName:
2933 lpDeviceName = None
2934 ucchMax = 0x1000
2935 lpTargetPath = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", ucchMax)
2936 _QueryDosDeviceW(lpDeviceName, lpTargetPath, ucchMax)
2937 return lpTargetPath.value
2938
2939
2940QueryDosDevice = GuessStringType(QueryDosDeviceA, QueryDosDeviceW)

2943# LPVOID WINAPI MapViewOfFile(
2944# __in HANDLE hFileMappingObject,
2945# __in DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
2946# __in DWORD dwFileOffsetHigh,
2947# __in DWORD dwFileOffsetLow,
2948# __in SIZE_T dwNumberOfBytesToMap
2949# );
2950def MapViewOfFile(
2951 hFileMappingObject,
2952 dwDesiredAccess=FILE_MAP_ALL_ACCESS | FILE_MAP_EXECUTE,
2953 dwFileOffsetHigh=0,
2954 dwFileOffsetLow=0,
2955 dwNumberOfBytesToMap=0,
2956):
2957 _MapViewOfFile = windll.kernel32.MapViewOfFile
2958 _MapViewOfFile.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, DWORD, DWORD, SIZE_T]
2959 _MapViewOfFile.restype = LPVOID
2960 lpBaseAddress = _MapViewOfFile(hFileMappingObject, dwDesiredAccess, dwFileOffsetHigh, dwFileOffsetLow, dwNumberOfBytesToMap)
2961 if lpBaseAddress == NULL:
2962 raise ctypes.WinError()
2963 return lpBaseAddress

2981# );

2983 _OpenFileMappingA = windll.kernel32.OpenFileMappingA

2986 _OpenFileMappingA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero

2988 return FileMappingHandle(hFileMappingObject)

2991def OpenFileMappingW(dwDesiredAccess, bInheritHandle, lpName):

2994 _OpenFileMappingW.restype = HANDLE
2995 _OpenFileMappingW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
2996 hFileMappingObject = _OpenFileMappingW(dwDesiredAccess, bool(bInheritHandle), lpName)

3003# HANDLE WINAPI CreateFileMapping(
3004# __in HANDLE hFile,
3005# __in_opt LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpAttributes,
3006# __in DWORD flProtect,
3007# __in DWORD dwMaximumSizeHigh,
3008# __in DWORD dwMaximumSizeLow,
3009# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpName
3010# );
3011def CreateFileMappingA(hFile, lpAttributes=None, flProtect=PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE, dwMaximumSizeHigh=0, dwMaximumSizeLow=0, lpName=None):
3012 _CreateFileMappingA = windll.kernel32.CreateFileMappingA
3013 _CreateFileMappingA.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, DWORD, DWORD, DWORD, LPSTR]
3014 _CreateFileMappingA.restype = HANDLE
3015 _CreateFileMappingA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3016
3017 if lpAttributes:
3018 lpAttributes = ctypes.pointer(lpAttributes)
3019 if not lpName:
3020 lpName = None
3021 hFileMappingObject = _CreateFileMappingA(hFile, lpAttributes, flProtect, dwMaximumSizeHigh, dwMaximumSizeLow, lpName)
3022 return FileMappingHandle(hFileMappingObject)
3023
3024
3025def CreateFileMappingW(hFile, lpAttributes=None, flProtect=PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE, dwMaximumSizeHigh=0, dwMaximumSizeLow=0, lpName=None):
3026 _CreateFileMappingW = windll.kernel32.CreateFileMappingW
3027 _CreateFileMappingW.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, DWORD, DWORD, DWORD, LPWSTR]
3028 _CreateFileMappingW.restype = HANDLE
3029 _CreateFileMappingW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero

3032 lpAttributes = ctypes.pointer(lpAttributes)
3033 if not lpName:
3034 lpName = None

3037

3042# HANDLE WINAPI CreateFile(
3043# __in LPCTSTR lpFileName,
3044# __in DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
3045# __in DWORD dwShareMode,
3046# __in_opt LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpSecurityAttributes,
3047# __in DWORD dwCreationDisposition,
3048# __in DWORD dwFlagsAndAttributes,
3049# __in_opt HANDLE hTemplateFile
3050# );
3051def CreateFileA(
3052 lpFileName,
3053 dwDesiredAccess=GENERIC_ALL,
3054 dwShareMode=0,
3055 lpSecurityAttributes=None,
3056 dwCreationDisposition=OPEN_ALWAYS,
3057 dwFlagsAndAttributes=FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL,
3058 hTemplateFile=None,
3059):
3060 _CreateFileA = windll.kernel32.CreateFileA
3061 _CreateFileA.argtypes = [LPSTR, DWORD, DWORD, LPVOID, DWORD, DWORD, HANDLE]
3062 _CreateFileA.restype = HANDLE
3063
3064 if not lpFileName:
3065 lpFileName = None
3066 if lpSecurityAttributes:
3067 lpSecurityAttributes = ctypes.pointer(lpSecurityAttributes)
3068 hFile = _CreateFileA(
3069 lpFileName, dwDesiredAccess, dwShareMode, lpSecurityAttributes, dwCreationDisposition, dwFlagsAndAttributes, hTemplateFile
3070 )
3071 if hFile == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE:
3072 raise ctypes.WinError()
3073 return FileHandle(hFile)
3074
3075
3076def CreateFileW(
3077 lpFileName,
3078 dwDesiredAccess=GENERIC_ALL,
3079 dwShareMode=0,
3080 lpSecurityAttributes=None,
3081 dwCreationDisposition=OPEN_ALWAYS,
3082 dwFlagsAndAttributes=FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL,
3083 hTemplateFile=None,
3084):
3085 _CreateFileW = windll.kernel32.CreateFileW
3086 _CreateFileW.argtypes = [LPWSTR, DWORD, DWORD, LPVOID, DWORD, DWORD, HANDLE]
3087 _CreateFileW.restype = HANDLE
3088
3089 if not lpFileName:
3090 lpFileName = None
3091 if lpSecurityAttributes:
3092 lpSecurityAttributes = ctypes.pointer(lpSecurityAttributes)
3093 hFile = _CreateFileW(
3094 lpFileName, dwDesiredAccess, dwShareMode, lpSecurityAttributes, dwCreationDisposition, dwFlagsAndAttributes, hTemplateFile
3095 )
3096 if hFile == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE:
3097 raise ctypes.WinError()
3098 return FileHandle(hFile)
3099
3100
3101CreateFile = GuessStringType(CreateFileA, CreateFileW)

3127# DWORD WINAPI SearchPath(
3128# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpPath,
3129# __in LPCTSTR lpFileName,
3130# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpExtension,
3131# __in DWORD nBufferLength,
3132# __out LPTSTR lpBuffer,
3133# __out_opt LPTSTR *lpFilePart
3134# );
3135def SearchPathA(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension):
3136 _SearchPathA = windll.kernel32.SearchPathA
3137 _SearchPathA.argtypes = [LPSTR, LPSTR, LPSTR, DWORD, LPSTR, POINTER(LPSTR)]
3138 _SearchPathA.restype = DWORD
3139 _SearchPathA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3140
3141 if not lpPath:
3142 lpPath = None
3143 if not lpExtension:
3144 lpExtension = None
3145 nBufferLength = _SearchPathA(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension, 0, None, None)
3146 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", nBufferLength + 1)
3147 lpFilePart = LPSTR()
3148 _SearchPathA(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension, nBufferLength, lpBuffer, byref(lpFilePart))
3149 lpFilePart = lpFilePart.value
3150 lpBuffer = lpBuffer.value
3151 if lpBuffer == "":
3152 if GetLastError() == ERROR_SUCCESS:
3153 raise ctypes.WinError(ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND)
3154 raise ctypes.WinError()
3155 return (lpBuffer, lpFilePart)
3156
3157
3158def SearchPathW(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension):
3159 _SearchPathW = windll.kernel32.SearchPathW
3160 _SearchPathW.argtypes = [LPWSTR, LPWSTR, LPWSTR, DWORD, LPWSTR, POINTER(LPWSTR)]
3161 _SearchPathW.restype = DWORD
3162 _SearchPathW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3163
3164 if not lpPath:
3165 lpPath = None
3166 if not lpExtension:
3167 lpExtension = None
3168 nBufferLength = _SearchPathW(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension, 0, None, None)
3169 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", nBufferLength + 1)
3170 lpFilePart = LPWSTR()
3171 _SearchPathW(lpPath, lpFileName, lpExtension, nBufferLength, lpBuffer, byref(lpFilePart))
3172 lpFilePart = lpFilePart.value
3173 lpBuffer = lpBuffer.value
3174 if lpBuffer == "":
3175 if GetLastError() == ERROR_SUCCESS:
3176 raise ctypes.WinError(ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND)
3177 raise ctypes.WinError()
3178 return (lpBuffer, lpFilePart)
3179
3180
3181SearchPath = GuessStringType(SearchPathA, SearchPathW)
3182
3183

3200# __out_opt LPVOID lpOutBuffer,
3201# __in DWORD nOutBufferSize,
3202# __out_opt LPDWORD lpBytesReturned,
3203# __inout_opt LPOVERLAPPED lpOverlapped
3204# );
3205def DeviceIoControl(hDevice, dwIoControlCode, lpInBuffer, nInBufferSize, lpOutBuffer, nOutBufferSize, lpOverlapped):
3206 _DeviceIoControl = windll.kernel32.DeviceIoControl
3207 _DeviceIoControl.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, LPVOID, DWORD, LPVOID, DWORD, LPDWORD, LPOVERLAPPED]
3208 _DeviceIoControl.restype = bool
3209 _DeviceIoControl.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3210
3211 if not lpInBuffer:
3212 lpInBuffer = None
3213 if not lpOutBuffer:
3214 lpOutBuffer = None
3215 if lpOverlapped:
3216 lpOverlapped = ctypes.pointer(lpOverlapped)
3217 lpBytesReturned = DWORD(0)
3218 _DeviceIoControl(hDevice, dwIoControlCode, lpInBuffer, nInBufferSize, lpOutBuffer, nOutBufferSize, byref(lpBytesReturned), lpOverlapped)
3219 return lpBytesReturned.value

3230 _GetFileInformationByHandle.errcheck = RaiseIfZero

3245 _GetFileInformationByHandleEx.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, LPVOID, DWORD]
3246 _GetFileInformationByHandleEx.restype = bool
3247 _GetFileInformationByHandleEx.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3248 # XXX TODO

3254# DWORD WINAPI GetFinalPathNameByHandle(
3255# __in HANDLE hFile,
3256# __out LPTSTR lpszFilePath,
3257# __in DWORD cchFilePath,
3258# __in DWORD dwFlags
3259# );
3260def GetFinalPathNameByHandleA(hFile, dwFlags=FILE_NAME_NORMALIZED | VOLUME_NAME_DOS):
3261 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleA = windll.kernel32.GetFinalPathNameByHandleA
3262 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleA.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPSTR, DWORD, DWORD]
3263 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleA.restype = DWORD
3264
3265 cchFilePath = _GetFinalPathNameByHandleA(hFile, None, 0, dwFlags)
3266 if cchFilePath == 0:
3267 raise ctypes.WinError()
3268 lpszFilePath = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", cchFilePath + 1)
3269 nCopied = _GetFinalPathNameByHandleA(hFile, lpszFilePath, cchFilePath, dwFlags)
3270 if nCopied <= 0 or nCopied > cchFilePath:
3271 raise ctypes.WinError()
3272 return lpszFilePath.value
3273
3274
3275def GetFinalPathNameByHandleW(hFile, dwFlags=FILE_NAME_NORMALIZED | VOLUME_NAME_DOS):
3276 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleW = windll.kernel32.GetFinalPathNameByHandleW
3277 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleW.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPWSTR, DWORD, DWORD]
3278 _GetFinalPathNameByHandleW.restype = DWORD
3279
3280 cchFilePath = _GetFinalPathNameByHandleW(hFile, None, 0, dwFlags)
3281 if cchFilePath == 0:
3282 raise ctypes.WinError()
3283 lpszFilePath = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", cchFilePath + 1)
3284 nCopied = _GetFinalPathNameByHandleW(hFile, lpszFilePath, cchFilePath, dwFlags)
3285 if nCopied <= 0 or nCopied > cchFilePath:
3286 raise ctypes.WinError()
3287 return lpszFilePath.value
3288
3289
3290GetFinalPathNameByHandle = GuessStringType(GetFinalPathNameByHandleA, GetFinalPathNameByHandleW)

3308 lpFilePart = LPSTR()
3309 nCopied = _GetFullPathNameA(lpFileName, nBufferLength, lpBuffer, byref(lpFilePart))

3311 raise ctypes.WinError()
3312 return lpBuffer.value, lpFilePart.value

3325 nCopied = _GetFullPathNameW(lpFileName, nBufferLength, lpBuffer, byref(lpFilePart))
3326 if nCopied > nBufferLength or nCopied == 0:

3378 _GetTempFileNameA = windll.kernel32.GetTempFileNameA
3379 _GetTempFileNameA.argtypes = [LPSTR, LPSTR, UINT, LPSTR]
3380 _GetTempFileNameA.restype = UINT

3386 if uUnique == 0:
