3408# DWORD WINAPI GetCurrentDirectory(
3409# __in DWORD nBufferLength,
3410# __out LPTSTR lpBuffer
3411# );
3412def GetCurrentDirectoryA():
3413 _GetCurrentDirectoryA = windll.kernel32.GetCurrentDirectoryA
3414 _GetCurrentDirectoryA.argtypes = [DWORD, LPSTR]
3415 _GetCurrentDirectoryA.restype = DWORD
3416
3417 nBufferLength = _GetCurrentDirectoryA(0, None)
3418 if nBufferLength <= 0:
3419 raise ctypes.WinError()
3420 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", nBufferLength)
3421 nCopied = _GetCurrentDirectoryA(nBufferLength, lpBuffer)
3422 if nCopied > nBufferLength or nCopied == 0:
3423 raise ctypes.WinError()
3424 return lpBuffer.value
3425
3426
3427def GetCurrentDirectoryW():
3428 _GetCurrentDirectoryW = windll.kernel32.GetCurrentDirectoryW
3429 _GetCurrentDirectoryW.argtypes = [DWORD, LPWSTR]
3430 _GetCurrentDirectoryW.restype = DWORD
3431
3432 nBufferLength = _GetCurrentDirectoryW(0, None)
3433 if nBufferLength <= 0:
3434 raise ctypes.WinError()
3435 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", nBufferLength)
3436 nCopied = _GetCurrentDirectoryW(nBufferLength, lpBuffer)
3437 if nCopied > nBufferLength or nCopied == 0:
3438 raise ctypes.WinError()
3439 return lpBuffer.value
3440
3441
3442GetCurrentDirectory = GuessStringType(GetCurrentDirectoryA, GetCurrentDirectoryW)
3443
3444# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3445# Contrl-C handler
3446
3447# BOOL WINAPI HandlerRoutine(
3448# __in DWORD dwCtrlType
3449# );
3450PHANDLER_ROUTINE = ctypes.WINFUNCTYPE(BOOL, DWORD)
3451
3452
3453# BOOL WINAPI SetConsoleCtrlHandler(
3454# __in_opt PHANDLER_ROUTINE HandlerRoutine,
3455# __in BOOL Add
3456# );
3457def SetConsoleCtrlHandler(HandlerRoutine=None, Add=True):
3458 _SetConsoleCtrlHandler = windll.kernel32.SetConsoleCtrlHandler
3459 _SetConsoleCtrlHandler.argtypes = [PHANDLER_ROUTINE, BOOL]
3460 _SetConsoleCtrlHandler.restype = bool
3461 _SetConsoleCtrlHandler.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3462 _SetConsoleCtrlHandler(HandlerRoutine, bool(Add))
3463 # we can't automagically transform Python functions to PHANDLER_ROUTINE
3464 # because a) the actual pointer value is meaningful to the API
3465 # and b) if it gets garbage collected bad things would happen
3466
3467
3468# BOOL WINAPI GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent(
3469# __in DWORD dwCtrlEvent,
3470# __in DWORD dwProcessGroupId
3471# );
3472def GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent(dwCtrlEvent, dwProcessGroupId):
3473 _GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent = windll.kernel32.GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent
3474 _GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent.argtypes = [DWORD, DWORD]
3475 _GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent.restype = bool
3476 _GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3477 _GenerateConsoleCtrlEvent(dwCtrlEvent, dwProcessGroupId)
3478
3479
3480# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3481# Synchronization API
3482
3483# XXX NOTE
3484#
3485# Instead of waiting forever, we wait for a small period of time and loop.
3486# This is a workaround for an unwanted behavior of psyco-accelerated code:
3487# you can't interrupt a blocking call using Ctrl+C, because signal processing
3488# is only done between C calls.
3489#
3490# Also see: bug #2793618 in Psyco project
3491# http://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&aid=2793618&group_id=41036&atid=429622
3492
3493
3494# DWORD WINAPI WaitForSingleObject(
3495# HANDLE hHandle,
3496# DWORD dwMilliseconds
3497# );
3498def WaitForSingleObject(hHandle, dwMilliseconds=INFINITE):
3499 _WaitForSingleObject = windll.kernel32.WaitForSingleObject
3500 _WaitForSingleObject.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD]
3501 _WaitForSingleObject.restype = DWORD
3502
3503 if not dwMilliseconds and dwMilliseconds != 0:
3504 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
3505 if dwMilliseconds != INFINITE:
3506 r = _WaitForSingleObject(hHandle, dwMilliseconds)
3507 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3508 raise ctypes.WinError()
3509 else:
3510 while 1:
3511 r = _WaitForSingleObject(hHandle, 100)
3512 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3513 raise ctypes.WinError()
3514 if r != WAIT_TIMEOUT:
3515 break
3516 return r
3517
3518
3519# DWORD WINAPI WaitForSingleObjectEx(
3520# HANDLE hHandle,
3521# DWORD dwMilliseconds,
3522# BOOL bAlertable
3523# );
3524def WaitForSingleObjectEx(hHandle, dwMilliseconds=INFINITE, bAlertable=True):
3525 _WaitForSingleObjectEx = windll.kernel32.WaitForSingleObjectEx
3526 _WaitForSingleObjectEx.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD, BOOL]
3527 _WaitForSingleObjectEx.restype = DWORD
3528
3529 if not dwMilliseconds and dwMilliseconds != 0:
3530 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
3531 if dwMilliseconds != INFINITE:
3532 r = _WaitForSingleObjectEx(hHandle, dwMilliseconds, bool(bAlertable))
3533 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3534 raise ctypes.WinError()
3535 else:
3536 while 1:
3537 r = _WaitForSingleObjectEx(hHandle, 100, bool(bAlertable))
3538 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3539 raise ctypes.WinError()
3540 if r != WAIT_TIMEOUT:
3541 break
3542 return r
3543
3544
3545# DWORD WINAPI WaitForMultipleObjects(
3546# DWORD nCount,
3547# const HANDLE *lpHandles,
3548# BOOL bWaitAll,
3549# DWORD dwMilliseconds
3550# );
3551def WaitForMultipleObjects(handles, bWaitAll=False, dwMilliseconds=INFINITE):
3552 _WaitForMultipleObjects = windll.kernel32.WaitForMultipleObjects
3553 _WaitForMultipleObjects.argtypes = [DWORD, POINTER(HANDLE), BOOL, DWORD]
3554 _WaitForMultipleObjects.restype = DWORD
3555
3556 if not dwMilliseconds and dwMilliseconds != 0:
3557 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
3558 nCount = len(handles)
3559 lpHandlesType = HANDLE * nCount
3560 lpHandles = lpHandlesType(*handles)
3561 if dwMilliseconds != INFINITE:
3562 r = _WaitForMultipleObjects(byref(lpHandles), bool(bWaitAll), dwMilliseconds)
3563 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3564 raise ctypes.WinError()
3565 else:
3566 while 1:
3567 r = _WaitForMultipleObjects(byref(lpHandles), bool(bWaitAll), 100)
3568 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3569 raise ctypes.WinError()
3570 if r != WAIT_TIMEOUT:
3571 break
3572 return r
3573
3574
3575# DWORD WINAPI WaitForMultipleObjectsEx(
3576# DWORD nCount,
3577# const HANDLE *lpHandles,
3578# BOOL bWaitAll,
3579# DWORD dwMilliseconds,
3580# BOOL bAlertable
3581# );
3582def WaitForMultipleObjectsEx(handles, bWaitAll=False, dwMilliseconds=INFINITE, bAlertable=True):
3583 _WaitForMultipleObjectsEx = windll.kernel32.WaitForMultipleObjectsEx
3584 _WaitForMultipleObjectsEx.argtypes = [DWORD, POINTER(HANDLE), BOOL, DWORD]
3585 _WaitForMultipleObjectsEx.restype = DWORD
3586
3587 if not dwMilliseconds and dwMilliseconds != 0:
3588 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
3589 nCount = len(handles)
3590 lpHandlesType = HANDLE * nCount
3591 lpHandles = lpHandlesType(*handles)
3592 if dwMilliseconds != INFINITE:
3593 r = _WaitForMultipleObjectsEx(byref(lpHandles), bool(bWaitAll), dwMilliseconds, bool(bAlertable))
3594 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3595 raise ctypes.WinError()
3596 else:
3597 while 1:
3598 r = _WaitForMultipleObjectsEx(byref(lpHandles), bool(bWaitAll), 100, bool(bAlertable))
3599 if r == WAIT_FAILED:
3600 raise ctypes.WinError()
3601 if r != WAIT_TIMEOUT:
3602 break
3603 return r
3604
3605
3606# HANDLE WINAPI CreateMutex(
3607# _In_opt_ LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpMutexAttributes,
3608# _In_ BOOL bInitialOwner,
3609# _In_opt_ LPCTSTR lpName
3610# );
3611def CreateMutexA(lpMutexAttributes=None, bInitialOwner=True, lpName=None):
3612 _CreateMutexA = windll.kernel32.CreateMutexA
3613 _CreateMutexA.argtypes = [LPVOID, BOOL, LPSTR]
3614 _CreateMutexA.restype = HANDLE
3615 _CreateMutexA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3616 return Handle(_CreateMutexA(lpMutexAttributes, bInitialOwner, lpName))
3617
3618
3619def CreateMutexW(lpMutexAttributes=None, bInitialOwner=True, lpName=None):
3620 _CreateMutexW = windll.kernel32.CreateMutexW
3621 _CreateMutexW.argtypes = [LPVOID, BOOL, LPWSTR]
3622 _CreateMutexW.restype = HANDLE
3623 _CreateMutexW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3624 return Handle(_CreateMutexW(lpMutexAttributes, bInitialOwner, lpName))
3625
3626
3627CreateMutex = GuessStringType(CreateMutexA, CreateMutexW)
3628
3629
3630# HANDLE WINAPI OpenMutex(
3631# _In_ DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
3632# _In_ BOOL bInheritHandle,
3633# _In_ LPCTSTR lpName
3634# );
3635def OpenMutexA(dwDesiredAccess=MUTEX_ALL_ACCESS, bInitialOwner=True, lpName=None):
3636 _OpenMutexA = windll.kernel32.OpenMutexA
3637 _OpenMutexA.argtypes = [DWORD, BOOL, LPSTR]
3638 _OpenMutexA.restype = HANDLE
3639 _OpenMutexA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3640 return Handle(_OpenMutexA(lpMutexAttributes, bInitialOwner, lpName))
3641
3642
3643def OpenMutexW(dwDesiredAccess=MUTEX_ALL_ACCESS, bInitialOwner=True, lpName=None):
3644 _OpenMutexW = windll.kernel32.OpenMutexW
3645 _OpenMutexW.argtypes = [DWORD, BOOL, LPWSTR]
3646 _OpenMutexW.restype = HANDLE
3647 _OpenMutexW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3648 return Handle(_OpenMutexW(lpMutexAttributes, bInitialOwner, lpName))
3649
3650
3651OpenMutex = GuessStringType(OpenMutexA, OpenMutexW)
3652
3653

3672 _CreateEventW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero

3772# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3773# Debug API
3774
3775
3776# BOOL WaitForDebugEvent(
3777# LPDEBUG_EVENT lpDebugEvent,
3778# DWORD dwMilliseconds
3779# );
3780def WaitForDebugEvent(dwMilliseconds=INFINITE):
3781 _WaitForDebugEvent = windll.kernel32.WaitForDebugEvent
3782 _WaitForDebugEvent.argtypes = [LPDEBUG_EVENT, DWORD]
3783 _WaitForDebugEvent.restype = DWORD
3784
3785 if not dwMilliseconds and dwMilliseconds != 0:
3786 dwMilliseconds = INFINITE
3787 lpDebugEvent = DEBUG_EVENT()
3788 lpDebugEvent.dwDebugEventCode = 0
3789 lpDebugEvent.dwProcessId = 0
3790 lpDebugEvent.dwThreadId = 0
3791 if dwMilliseconds != INFINITE:
3792 success = _WaitForDebugEvent(byref(lpDebugEvent), dwMilliseconds)
3793 if success == 0:
3794 raise ctypes.WinError()
3795 else:
3796 # this avoids locking the Python GIL for too long
3797 while 1:
3798 success = _WaitForDebugEvent(byref(lpDebugEvent), 100)
3799 if success != 0:
3800 break
3801 code = GetLastError()
3802 if code not in (ERROR_SEM_TIMEOUT, WAIT_TIMEOUT):
3803 raise ctypes.WinError(code)
3804 return lpDebugEvent
3805
3806
3807# BOOL ContinueDebugEvent(
3808# DWORD dwProcessId,
3809# DWORD dwThreadId,
3810# DWORD dwContinueStatus
3811# );
3812def ContinueDebugEvent(dwProcessId, dwThreadId, dwContinueStatus=DBG_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED):
3813 _ContinueDebugEvent = windll.kernel32.ContinueDebugEvent
3814 _ContinueDebugEvent.argtypes = [DWORD, DWORD, DWORD]
3815 _ContinueDebugEvent.restype = bool
3816 _ContinueDebugEvent.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3817 _ContinueDebugEvent(dwProcessId, dwThreadId, dwContinueStatus)
3818
3819

3829 _FlushInstructionCache.restype = bool
3830 _FlushInstructionCache.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
3831 _FlushInstructionCache(hProcess, lpBaseAddress, dwSize)

3913# BOOL WINAPI ReadProcessMemory(
3914# __in HANDLE hProcess,
3915# __in LPCVOID lpBaseAddress,
3916# __out LPVOID lpBuffer,
3917# __in SIZE_T nSize,
3918# __out SIZE_T* lpNumberOfBytesRead
3919# );
3920def ReadProcessMemory(hProcess, lpBaseAddress, nSize):
3921 _ReadProcessMemory = windll.kernel32.ReadProcessMemory
3922 _ReadProcessMemory.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, LPVOID, SIZE_T, POINTER(SIZE_T)]
3923 _ReadProcessMemory.restype = bool
3924
3925 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer(compat.b(""), nSize)
3926 lpNumberOfBytesRead = SIZE_T(0)
3927 success = _ReadProcessMemory(hProcess, lpBaseAddress, lpBuffer, nSize, byref(lpNumberOfBytesRead))
3928 if not success and GetLastError() != ERROR_PARTIAL_COPY:
3929 raise ctypes.WinError()
3930 return compat.b(lpBuffer.raw)[: lpNumberOfBytesRead.value]
3931
3932
3933# BOOL WINAPI WriteProcessMemory(
3934# __in HANDLE hProcess,
3935# __in LPCVOID lpBaseAddress,
3936# __in LPVOID lpBuffer,
3937# __in SIZE_T nSize,
3938# __out SIZE_T* lpNumberOfBytesWritten
3939# );
3940def WriteProcessMemory(hProcess, lpBaseAddress, lpBuffer):
3941 _WriteProcessMemory = windll.kernel32.WriteProcessMemory
3942 _WriteProcessMemory.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, LPVOID, SIZE_T, POINTER(SIZE_T)]
3943 _WriteProcessMemory.restype = bool
3944
3945 nSize = len(lpBuffer)
3946 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer(lpBuffer)
3947 lpNumberOfBytesWritten = SIZE_T(0)
3948 success = _WriteProcessMemory(hProcess, lpBaseAddress, lpBuffer, nSize, byref(lpNumberOfBytesWritten))
3949 if not success and GetLastError() != ERROR_PARTIAL_COPY:
3950 raise ctypes.WinError()
3951 return lpNumberOfBytesWritten.value
3952
3953
3954# LPVOID WINAPI VirtualAllocEx(
3955# __in HANDLE hProcess,
3956# __in_opt LPVOID lpAddress,
3957# __in SIZE_T dwSize,
3958# __in DWORD flAllocationType,
3959# __in DWORD flProtect
3960# );
3961def VirtualAllocEx(hProcess, lpAddress=0, dwSize=0x1000, flAllocationType=MEM_COMMIT | MEM_RESERVE, flProtect=PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE):
3962 _VirtualAllocEx = windll.kernel32.VirtualAllocEx
3963 _VirtualAllocEx.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, SIZE_T, DWORD, DWORD]
3964 _VirtualAllocEx.restype = LPVOID
3965
3966 lpAddress = _VirtualAllocEx(hProcess, lpAddress, dwSize, flAllocationType, flProtect)
3967 if lpAddress == NULL:
3968 raise ctypes.WinError()
3969 return lpAddress
3970
3971
3972# SIZE_T WINAPI VirtualQueryEx(
3973# __in HANDLE hProcess,
3974# __in_opt LPCVOID lpAddress,
3975# __out PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION lpBuffer,
3976# __in SIZE_T dwLength
3977# );
3978def VirtualQueryEx(hProcess, lpAddress):
3979 _VirtualQueryEx = windll.kernel32.VirtualQueryEx
3980 _VirtualQueryEx.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, PMEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION, SIZE_T]
3981 _VirtualQueryEx.restype = SIZE_T
3982
3983 lpBuffer = MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION()
3984 dwLength = sizeof(MEMORY_BASIC_INFORMATION)
3985 success = _VirtualQueryEx(hProcess, lpAddress, byref(lpBuffer), dwLength)
3986 if success == 0:
3987 raise ctypes.WinError()
3988 return MemoryBasicInformation(lpBuffer)
3989
3990
3991# BOOL WINAPI VirtualProtectEx(
3992# __in HANDLE hProcess,
3993# __in LPVOID lpAddress,
3994# __in SIZE_T dwSize,
3995# __in DWORD flNewProtect,
3996# __out PDWORD lpflOldProtect
3997# );
3998def VirtualProtectEx(hProcess, lpAddress, dwSize, flNewProtect=PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE):
3999 _VirtualProtectEx = windll.kernel32.VirtualProtectEx
4000 _VirtualProtectEx.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPVOID, SIZE_T, DWORD, PDWORD]
4001 _VirtualProtectEx.restype = bool
4002 _VirtualProtectEx.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4003
4004 flOldProtect = DWORD(0)
4005 _VirtualProtectEx(hProcess, lpAddress, dwSize, flNewProtect, byref(flOldProtect))
4006 return flOldProtect.value
4007

4023# HANDLE WINAPI CreateRemoteThread(
4024# __in HANDLE hProcess,
4025# __in LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpThreadAttributes,

4030# __out LPDWORD lpThreadId
4031# );
4032def CreateRemoteThread(hProcess, lpThreadAttributes, dwStackSize, lpStartAddress, lpParameter, dwCreationFlags):
4033 _CreateRemoteThread = windll.kernel32.CreateRemoteThread
4034 _CreateRemoteThread.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES, SIZE_T, LPVOID, LPVOID, DWORD, LPDWORD]
4035 _CreateRemoteThread.restype = HANDLE
4036
4037 if not lpThreadAttributes:
4038 lpThreadAttributes = None
4039 else:
4040 lpThreadAttributes = byref(lpThreadAttributes)
4041 dwThreadId = DWORD(0)
4042 hThread = _CreateRemoteThread(
4043 hProcess, lpThreadAttributes, dwStackSize, lpStartAddress, lpParameter, dwCreationFlags, byref(dwThreadId)
4044 )
4045 if not hThread:
4046 raise ctypes.WinError()
4047 return ThreadHandle(hThread), dwThreadId.value
4048
4049
4050# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
4051# Process API
4052
4053
4054# BOOL WINAPI CreateProcess(
4055# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpApplicationName,
4056# __inout_opt LPTSTR lpCommandLine,
4057# __in_opt LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpProcessAttributes,
4058# __in_opt LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES lpThreadAttributes,
4059# __in BOOL bInheritHandles,
4060# __in DWORD dwCreationFlags,
4061# __in_opt LPVOID lpEnvironment,
4062# __in_opt LPCTSTR lpCurrentDirectory,
4063# __in LPSTARTUPINFO lpStartupInfo,
4064# __out LPPROCESS_INFORMATION lpProcessInformation
4065# );
4066def CreateProcessA(
4067 lpApplicationName,
4068 lpCommandLine=None,
4069 lpProcessAttributes=None,
4070 lpThreadAttributes=None,
4071 bInheritHandles=False,
4072 dwCreationFlags=0,
4073 lpEnvironment=None,
4074 lpCurrentDirectory=None,
4075 lpStartupInfo=None,
4076):
4077 _CreateProcessA = windll.kernel32.CreateProcessA
4078 _CreateProcessA.argtypes = [
4079 LPSTR,
4080 LPSTR,
4081 LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES,
4082 LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES,
4083 BOOL,
4084 DWORD,
4085 LPVOID,
4086 LPSTR,
4087 LPVOID,
4088 LPPROCESS_INFORMATION,
4089 ]
4090 _CreateProcessA.restype = bool
4091 _CreateProcessA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4092
4093 if not lpApplicationName:
4094 lpApplicationName = None
4095 if not lpCommandLine:
4096 lpCommandLine = None
4097 else:
4098 lpCommandLine = ctypes.create_string_buffer(lpCommandLine, max(MAX_PATH, len(lpCommandLine)))
4099 if not lpEnvironment:
4100 lpEnvironment = None
4101 else:
4102 lpEnvironment = ctypes.create_string_buffer(lpEnvironment)
4103 if not lpCurrentDirectory:
4104 lpCurrentDirectory = None
4105 if not lpProcessAttributes:
4106 lpProcessAttributes = None
4107 else:
4108 lpProcessAttributes = byref(lpProcessAttributes)
4109 if not lpThreadAttributes:
4110 lpThreadAttributes = None
4111 else:
4112 lpThreadAttributes = byref(lpThreadAttributes)
4113 if not lpStartupInfo:
4114 lpStartupInfo = STARTUPINFO()
4115 lpStartupInfo.cb = sizeof(STARTUPINFO)
4116 lpStartupInfo.lpReserved = 0
4117 lpStartupInfo.lpDesktop = 0
4118 lpStartupInfo.lpTitle = 0
4119 lpStartupInfo.dwFlags = 0
4120 lpStartupInfo.cbReserved2 = 0
4121 lpStartupInfo.lpReserved2 = 0
4122 lpProcessInformation = PROCESS_INFORMATION()
4123 lpProcessInformation.hProcess = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
4124 lpProcessInformation.hThread = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
4125 lpProcessInformation.dwProcessId = 0
4126 lpProcessInformation.dwThreadId = 0
4127 _CreateProcessA(
4128 lpApplicationName,
4129 lpCommandLine,
4130 lpProcessAttributes,
4131 lpThreadAttributes,
4132 bool(bInheritHandles),
4133 dwCreationFlags,
4134 lpEnvironment,
4135 lpCurrentDirectory,
4136 byref(lpStartupInfo),
4137 byref(lpProcessInformation),
4138 )
4139 return ProcessInformation(lpProcessInformation)
4140
4141
4142def CreateProcessW(
4143 lpApplicationName,
4144 lpCommandLine=None,
4145 lpProcessAttributes=None,
4146 lpThreadAttributes=None,
4147 bInheritHandles=False,
4148 dwCreationFlags=0,
4149 lpEnvironment=None,
4150 lpCurrentDirectory=None,
4151 lpStartupInfo=None,
4152):
4153 _CreateProcessW = windll.kernel32.CreateProcessW
4154 _CreateProcessW.argtypes = [
4155 LPWSTR,
4156 LPWSTR,
4157 LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES,
4158 LPSECURITY_ATTRIBUTES,
4159 BOOL,
4160 DWORD,
4161 LPVOID,
4162 LPWSTR,
4163 LPVOID,
4164 LPPROCESS_INFORMATION,
4165 ]
4166 _CreateProcessW.restype = bool
4167 _CreateProcessW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4168
4169 if not lpApplicationName:
4170 lpApplicationName = None
4171 if not lpCommandLine:
4172 lpCommandLine = None
4173 else:
4174 lpCommandLine = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer(lpCommandLine, max(MAX_PATH, len(lpCommandLine)))
4175 if not lpEnvironment:
4176 lpEnvironment = None
4177 else:
4178 lpEnvironment = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer(lpEnvironment)
4179 if not lpCurrentDirectory:
4180 lpCurrentDirectory = None
4181 if not lpProcessAttributes:
4182 lpProcessAttributes = None
4183 else:
4184 lpProcessAttributes = byref(lpProcessAttributes)
4185 if not lpThreadAttributes:
4186 lpThreadAttributes = None
4187 else:
4188 lpThreadAttributes = byref(lpThreadAttributes)
4189 if not lpStartupInfo:
4190 lpStartupInfo = STARTUPINFO()
4191 lpStartupInfo.cb = sizeof(STARTUPINFO)
4192 lpStartupInfo.lpReserved = 0
4193 lpStartupInfo.lpDesktop = 0
4194 lpStartupInfo.lpTitle = 0
4195 lpStartupInfo.dwFlags = 0
4196 lpStartupInfo.cbReserved2 = 0
4197 lpStartupInfo.lpReserved2 = 0
4198 lpProcessInformation = PROCESS_INFORMATION()
4199 lpProcessInformation.hProcess = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
4200 lpProcessInformation.hThread = INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
4201 lpProcessInformation.dwProcessId = 0
4202 lpProcessInformation.dwThreadId = 0
4203 _CreateProcessW(
4204 lpApplicationName,
4205 lpCommandLine,
4206 lpProcessAttributes,
4207 lpThreadAttributes,
4208 bool(bInheritHandles),
4209 dwCreationFlags,
4210 lpEnvironment,
4211 lpCurrentDirectory,
4212 byref(lpStartupInfo),
4213 byref(lpProcessInformation),
4214 )
4215 return ProcessInformation(lpProcessInformation)
4216
4217
4218CreateProcess = GuessStringType(CreateProcessA, CreateProcessW)
4219
4220
4221# BOOL WINAPI InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(
4222# __out_opt LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST lpAttributeList,
4223# __in DWORD dwAttributeCount,
4224# __reserved DWORD dwFlags,
4225# __inout PSIZE_T lpSize
4226# );
4227def InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(dwAttributeCount):
4228 _InitializeProcThreadAttributeList = windll.kernel32.InitializeProcThreadAttributeList
4229 _InitializeProcThreadAttributeList.argtypes = [LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST, DWORD, DWORD, PSIZE_T]
4230 _InitializeProcThreadAttributeList.restype = bool
4231
4232 Size = SIZE_T(0)
4233 _InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(None, dwAttributeCount, 0, byref(Size))
4234 RaiseIfZero(Size.value)
4235 AttributeList = (BYTE * Size.value)()
4236 success = _InitializeProcThreadAttributeList(byref(AttributeList), dwAttributeCount, 0, byref(Size))
4237 RaiseIfZero(success)
4238 return AttributeList
4239
4240
4241# BOOL WINAPI UpdateProcThreadAttribute(
4242# __inout LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST lpAttributeList,
4243# __in DWORD dwFlags,
4244# __in DWORD_PTR Attribute,
4245# __in PVOID lpValue,
4246# __in SIZE_T cbSize,
4247# __out_opt PVOID lpPreviousValue,
4248# __in_opt PSIZE_T lpReturnSize
4249# );
4250def UpdateProcThreadAttribute(lpAttributeList, Attribute, Value, cbSize=None):
4251 _UpdateProcThreadAttribute = windll.kernel32.UpdateProcThreadAttribute
4252 _UpdateProcThreadAttribute.argtypes = [LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST, DWORD, DWORD_PTR, PVOID, SIZE_T, PVOID, PSIZE_T]
4253 _UpdateProcThreadAttribute.restype = bool
4254 _UpdateProcThreadAttribute.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4255
4256 if cbSize is None:
4257 cbSize = sizeof(Value)
4258 _UpdateProcThreadAttribute(byref(lpAttributeList), 0, Attribute, byref(Value), cbSize, None, None)
4259
4260
4261# VOID WINAPI DeleteProcThreadAttributeList(
4262# __inout LPPROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_LIST lpAttributeList
4263# );
4264def DeleteProcThreadAttributeList(lpAttributeList):
4265 _DeleteProcThreadAttributeList = windll.kernel32.DeleteProcThreadAttributeList
4266 _DeleteProcThreadAttributeList.restype = None
4267 _DeleteProcThreadAttributeList(byref(lpAttributeList))
4268
4269
4270# HANDLE WINAPI OpenProcess(
4271# __in DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
4272# __in BOOL bInheritHandle,
4273# __in DWORD dwProcessId
4274# );
4275def OpenProcess(dwDesiredAccess, bInheritHandle, dwProcessId):
4276 _OpenProcess = windll.kernel32.OpenProcess
4277 _OpenProcess.argtypes = [DWORD, BOOL, DWORD]
4278 _OpenProcess.restype = HANDLE
4279
4280 hProcess = _OpenProcess(dwDesiredAccess, bool(bInheritHandle), dwProcessId)
4281 if hProcess == NULL:
4282 raise ctypes.WinError()
4283 return ProcessHandle(hProcess, dwAccess=dwDesiredAccess)
4284
4285
4286# HANDLE WINAPI OpenThread(
4287# __in DWORD dwDesiredAccess,
4288# __in BOOL bInheritHandle,
4289# __in DWORD dwThreadId
4290# );
4291def OpenThread(dwDesiredAccess, bInheritHandle, dwThreadId):
4292 _OpenThread = windll.kernel32.OpenThread
4293 _OpenThread.argtypes = [DWORD, BOOL, DWORD]
4294 _OpenThread.restype = HANDLE
4295
4296 hThread = _OpenThread(dwDesiredAccess, bool(bInheritHandle), dwThreadId)
4297 if hThread == NULL:
4298 raise ctypes.WinError()
4299 return ThreadHandle(hThread, dwAccess=dwDesiredAccess)
4300

4302# DWORD WINAPI SuspendThread(
4303# __in HANDLE hThread
4304# );

4306 _SuspendThread = windll.kernel32.SuspendThread
4307 _SuspendThread.argtypes = [HANDLE]
4308 _SuspendThread.restype = DWORD
4309
4310 previousCount = _SuspendThread(hThread)
4311 if previousCount == DWORD(-1).value:
4312 raise ctypes.WinError()
4313 return previousCount

4539# HANDLE WINAPI CreateToolhelp32Snapshot(
4540# __in DWORD dwFlags,
4541# __in DWORD th32ProcessID
4542# );
4543def CreateToolhelp32Snapshot(dwFlags=TH32CS_SNAPALL, th32ProcessID=0):
4544 _CreateToolhelp32Snapshot = windll.kernel32.CreateToolhelp32Snapshot
4545 _CreateToolhelp32Snapshot.argtypes = [DWORD, DWORD]
4546 _CreateToolhelp32Snapshot.restype = HANDLE
4547
4548 hSnapshot = _CreateToolhelp32Snapshot(dwFlags, th32ProcessID)
4549 if hSnapshot == INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE:
4550 raise ctypes.WinError()
4551 return SnapshotHandle(hSnapshot)
4552
4553
4554# BOOL WINAPI Process32First(
4555# __in HANDLE hSnapshot,
4556# __inout LPPROCESSENTRY32 lppe
4557# );
4558def Process32First(hSnapshot):
4559 _Process32First = windll.kernel32.Process32First
4560 _Process32First.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPPROCESSENTRY32]
4561 _Process32First.restype = bool
4562
4563 pe = PROCESSENTRY32()
4564 pe.dwSize = sizeof(PROCESSENTRY32)
4565 success = _Process32First(hSnapshot, byref(pe))
4566 if not success:
4567 if GetLastError() == ERROR_NO_MORE_FILES:
4568 return None
4569 raise ctypes.WinError()
4570 return pe
4571
4572
4573# BOOL WINAPI Process32Next(
4574# __in HANDLE hSnapshot,

4576# );

4580 _Process32Next.restype = bool
4581
4582 if pe is None:
4583 pe = PROCESSENTRY32()
4584 pe.dwSize = sizeof(PROCESSENTRY32)
4585 success = _Process32Next(hSnapshot, byref(pe))
4586 if not success:
4587 if GetLastError() == ERROR_NO_MORE_FILES:
4588 return None
4589 raise ctypes.WinError()
4590 return pe

4716
4717 hl = HEAPLIST32()
4718 hl.dwSize = sizeof(HEAPLIST32)
4719 success = _Heap32ListFirst(hSnapshot, byref(hl))
4720 if not success:
4721 if GetLastError() == ERROR_NO_MORE_FILES:
4722 return None
4723 raise ctypes.WinError()
4724 return hl
4725
4726
4727# BOOL WINAPI Heap32ListNext(
4728# __in HANDLE hSnapshot,
4729# __out LPHEAPLIST32 lphl
4730# );
4731def Heap32ListNext(hSnapshot, hl=None):
4732 _Heap32ListNext = windll.kernel32.Heap32ListNext
4733 _Heap32ListNext.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPHEAPLIST32]
4734 _Heap32ListNext.restype = bool
4735
4736 if hl is None:
4737 hl = HEAPLIST32()
4738 hl.dwSize = sizeof(HEAPLIST32)
4739 success = _Heap32ListNext(hSnapshot, byref(hl))
4740 if not success:
4741 if GetLastError() == ERROR_NO_MORE_FILES:
4742 return None
4743 raise ctypes.WinError()
4744 return hl
4745
4746
4747# BOOL WINAPI Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory(
4748# __in DWORD th32ProcessID,
4749# __in LPCVOID lpBaseAddress,
4750# __out LPVOID lpBuffer,
4751# __in SIZE_T cbRead,
4752# __out SIZE_T lpNumberOfBytesRead
4753# );
4754def Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory(th32ProcessID, lpBaseAddress, cbRead):
4755 _Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory = windll.kernel32.Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory
4756 _Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory.argtypes = [DWORD, LPVOID, LPVOID, SIZE_T, POINTER(SIZE_T)]
4757 _Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory.restype = bool
4758
4759 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", cbRead)
4760 lpNumberOfBytesRead = SIZE_T(0)
4761 success = _Toolhelp32ReadProcessMemory(th32ProcessID, lpBaseAddress, lpBuffer, cbRead, byref(lpNumberOfBytesRead))
4762 if not success and GetLastError() != ERROR_PARTIAL_COPY:
4763 raise ctypes.WinError()
4764 return str(lpBuffer.raw)[: lpNumberOfBytesRead.value]
4765

4771# BOOL WINAPI GetProcessDEPPolicy(
4772# __in HANDLE hProcess,
4773# __out LPDWORD lpFlags,
4774# __out PBOOL lpPermanent
4775# );

4777# XP SP3 and > only
4778def GetProcessDEPPolicy(hProcess):
4779 _GetProcessDEPPolicy = windll.kernel32.GetProcessDEPPolicy
4780 _GetProcessDEPPolicy.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPDWORD, PBOOL]
4781 _GetProcessDEPPolicy.restype = bool
4782 _GetProcessDEPPolicy.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4783
4784 lpFlags = DWORD(0)
4785 lpPermanent = BOOL(0)
4786 _GetProcessDEPPolicy(hProcess, byref(lpFlags), byref(lpPermanent))
4787 return (lpFlags.value, lpPermanent.value)

4822# DWORD WINAPI GetGuiResources(
4823# __in HANDLE hProcess,
4824# __in DWORD uiFlags
4825# );
4826def GetGuiResources(hProcess, uiFlags=GR_GDIOBJECTS):
4827 _GetGuiResources = windll.kernel32.GetGuiResources
4828 _GetGuiResources.argtypes = [HANDLE, DWORD]
4829 _GetGuiResources.restype = DWORD
4830
4831 dwCount = _GetGuiResources(hProcess, uiFlags)
4832 if dwCount == 0:
4833 errcode = GetLastError()
4834 if errcode != ERROR_SUCCESS:
4835 raise ctypes.WinError(errcode)
4836 return dwCount
4837
4838

4845 _GetProcessHandleCount.argtypes = [HANDLE, PDWORD]
4846 _GetProcessHandleCount.restype = DWORD
4847 _GetProcessHandleCount.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4848
4849 pdwHandleCount = DWORD(0)
4850 _GetProcessHandleCount(hProcess, byref(pdwHandleCount))
4851 return pdwHandleCount.value

4853
4854# BOOL WINAPI GetProcessTimes(
4855# __in HANDLE hProcess,
4856# __out LPFILETIME lpCreationTime,
4857# __out LPFILETIME lpExitTime,
4858# __out LPFILETIME lpKernelTime,
4859# __out LPFILETIME lpUserTime
4860# );
4861def GetProcessTimes(hProcess=None):
4862 _GetProcessTimes = windll.kernel32.GetProcessTimes
4863 _GetProcessTimes.argtypes = [HANDLE, LPFILETIME, LPFILETIME, LPFILETIME, LPFILETIME]
4864 _GetProcessTimes.restype = bool
4865 _GetProcessTimes.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4866
4867 if hProcess is None:
4868 hProcess = GetCurrentProcess()
4869
4870 CreationTime = FILETIME()
4871 ExitTime = FILETIME()
4872 KernelTime = FILETIME()
4873 UserTime = FILETIME()
4874
4875 _GetProcessTimes(hProcess, byref(CreationTime), byref(ExitTime), byref(KernelTime), byref(UserTime))
4876
4877 return (CreationTime, ExitTime, KernelTime, UserTime)
4878
4879
4880# BOOL WINAPI FileTimeToSystemTime(
4881# __in const FILETIME *lpFileTime,
4882# __out LPSYSTEMTIME lpSystemTime
4883# );
4884def FileTimeToSystemTime(lpFileTime):
4885 _FileTimeToSystemTime = windll.kernel32.FileTimeToSystemTime
4886 _FileTimeToSystemTime.argtypes = [LPFILETIME, LPSYSTEMTIME]
4887 _FileTimeToSystemTime.restype = bool
4888 _FileTimeToSystemTime.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4889
4890 if isinstance(lpFileTime, FILETIME):
4891 FileTime = lpFileTime
4892 else:
4893 FileTime = FILETIME()
4894 FileTime.dwLowDateTime = lpFileTime & 0xFFFFFFFF
4895 FileTime.dwHighDateTime = lpFileTime >> 32
4896 SystemTime = SYSTEMTIME()
4897 _FileTimeToSystemTime(byref(FileTime), byref(SystemTime))
4898 return SystemTime
4899
4900
4901# void WINAPI GetSystemTimeAsFileTime(
4902# __out LPFILETIME lpSystemTimeAsFileTime
4903# );
4904def GetSystemTimeAsFileTime():
4905 _GetSystemTimeAsFileTime = windll.kernel32.GetSystemTimeAsFileTime
4906 _GetSystemTimeAsFileTime.argtypes = [LPFILETIME]
4907 _GetSystemTimeAsFileTime.restype = None
4908
4909 FileTime = FILETIME()
4910 _GetSystemTimeAsFileTime(byref(FileTime))
4911 return FileTime

4923 _GlobalAddAtomA.argtypes = [LPSTR]
4924 _GlobalAddAtomA.restype = ATOM
4925 _GlobalAddAtomA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4926 return _GlobalAddAtomA(lpString)
4927
4928
4929def GlobalAddAtomW(lpString):
4930 _GlobalAddAtomW = windll.kernel32.GlobalAddAtomW
4931 _GlobalAddAtomW.argtypes = [LPWSTR]
4932 _GlobalAddAtomW.restype = ATOM
4933 _GlobalAddAtomW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4934 return _GlobalAddAtomW(lpString)
4935
4936
4937GlobalAddAtom = GuessStringType(GlobalAddAtomA, GlobalAddAtomW)
4938
4939
4940# ATOM GlobalFindAtom(
4941# __in LPCTSTR lpString
4942# );
4943def GlobalFindAtomA(lpString):
4944 _GlobalFindAtomA = windll.kernel32.GlobalFindAtomA
4945 _GlobalFindAtomA.argtypes = [LPSTR]
4946 _GlobalFindAtomA.restype = ATOM
4947 _GlobalFindAtomA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4948 return _GlobalFindAtomA(lpString)
4949
4950
4951def GlobalFindAtomW(lpString):
4952 _GlobalFindAtomW = windll.kernel32.GlobalFindAtomW
4953 _GlobalFindAtomW.argtypes = [LPWSTR]
4954 _GlobalFindAtomW.restype = ATOM
4955 _GlobalFindAtomW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4956 return _GlobalFindAtomW(lpString)
4957
4958
4959GlobalFindAtom = GuessStringType(GlobalFindAtomA, GlobalFindAtomW)
4960
4961
4962# UINT GlobalGetAtomName(
4963# __in ATOM nAtom,
4964# __out LPTSTR lpBuffer,
4965# __in int nSize
4966# );
4967def GlobalGetAtomNameA(nAtom):
4968 _GlobalGetAtomNameA = windll.kernel32.GlobalGetAtomNameA
4969 _GlobalGetAtomNameA.argtypes = [ATOM, LPSTR, ctypes.c_int]
4970 _GlobalGetAtomNameA.restype = UINT
4971 _GlobalGetAtomNameA.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4972
4973 nSize = 64
4974 while 1:
4975 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_string_buffer("", nSize)
4976 nCopied = _GlobalGetAtomNameA(nAtom, lpBuffer, nSize)
4977 if nCopied < nSize - 1:
4978 break
4979 nSize = nSize + 64
4980 return lpBuffer.value
4981
4982
4983def GlobalGetAtomNameW(nAtom):
4984 _GlobalGetAtomNameW = windll.kernel32.GlobalGetAtomNameW
4985 _GlobalGetAtomNameW.argtypes = [ATOM, LPWSTR, ctypes.c_int]
4986 _GlobalGetAtomNameW.restype = UINT
4987 _GlobalGetAtomNameW.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
4988
4989 nSize = 64
4990 while 1:
4991 lpBuffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer("", nSize)
4992 nCopied = _GlobalGetAtomNameW(nAtom, lpBuffer, nSize)
4993 if nCopied < nSize - 1:
4994 break
4995 nSize = nSize + 64
4996 return lpBuffer.value
4997
4998
4999GlobalGetAtomName = GuessStringType(GlobalGetAtomNameA, GlobalGetAtomNameW)
5000
5001
5002# ATOM GlobalDeleteAtom(
5003# __in ATOM nAtom
5004# );
5005def GlobalDeleteAtom(nAtom):
5006 _GlobalDeleteAtom = windll.kernel32.GlobalDeleteAtom
5007 _GlobalDeleteAtom.argtypes
5008 _GlobalDeleteAtom.restype
5009 SetLastError(ERROR_SUCCESS)
5010 _GlobalDeleteAtom(nAtom)
5011 error = GetLastError()
5012 if error != ERROR_SUCCESS:
5013 raise ctypes.WinError(error)
5014
5015
5016# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5017# Wow64
5018
5019
5020# DWORD WINAPI Wow64SuspendThread(
5021# _In_ HANDLE hThread
5022# );
5023def Wow64SuspendThread(hThread):
5024 _Wow64SuspendThread = windll.kernel32.Wow64SuspendThread
5025 _Wow64SuspendThread.argtypes = [HANDLE]
5026 _Wow64SuspendThread.restype = DWORD
5027
5028 previousCount = _Wow64SuspendThread(hThread)
5029 if previousCount == DWORD(-1).value:
5030 raise ctypes.WinError()
5031 return previousCount
5032
5033
5034# BOOLEAN WINAPI Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(
5035# __in BOOLEAN Wow64FsEnableRedirection
5036# );
5037def Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(Wow64FsEnableRedirection):
5038 """
5039 This function may not work reliably when there are nested calls. Therefore,
5040 this function has been replaced by the L{Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection}
5041 and L{Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection} functions.
5042
5043 @see: U{http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/aa365744(v=vs.85).aspx}
5044 """
5045 _Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection = windll.kernel32.Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection
5046 _Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection.argtypes = [BOOLEAN]
5047 _Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection.restype = BOOLEAN
5048 _Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
5049
5050
5051# BOOL WINAPI Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(
5052# __out PVOID *OldValue
5053# );
5054def Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection():
5055 _Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection = windll.kernel32.Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection
5056 _Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection.argtypes = [PPVOID]
5057 _Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection.restype = BOOL
5058 _Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
5059
5060 OldValue = PVOID(None)
5061 _Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(byref(OldValue))
5062 return OldValue
5063
5064
5065# BOOL WINAPI Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection(
5066# __in PVOID OldValue
5067# );
5068def Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection(OldValue):
5069 _Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection = windll.kernel32.Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection
5070 _Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection.argtypes = [PVOID]
5071 _Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection.restype = BOOL
5072 _Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection.errcheck = RaiseIfZero
5073 _Wow64RevertWow64FsRedirection(OldValue)

5076# ==============================================================================
5077# This calculates the list of exported symbols.
5078_all = set(vars().keys()).difference(_all)
5079__all__ = [_x for _x in _all if not _x.startswith("_")]
5080__all__.sort()
5081# ==============================================================================
5082
5083# ==============================================================================
5084# Mark functions that Psyco cannot compile.
5085# In your programs, don't use psyco.full().
5086# Call psyco.bind() on your main function instead.
5087
5088try:
5089 import psyco
5090
5091 psyco.cannotcompile(WaitForDebugEvent)
5092 psyco.cannotcompile(WaitForSingleObject)
5093 psyco.cannotcompile(WaitForSingleObjectEx)
5094 psyco.cannotcompile(WaitForMultipleObjects)
5095 psyco.cannotcompile(WaitForMultipleObjectsEx)
5096except ImportError:
5097 pass
